paragraphs.zh: 这影响的不仅仅是勇闯对俄制裁的少数买家。土耳其这个主要买家将把精炼柴油留在本国使用，从而使地中海其他地区供应减少，Vortexa 的船舶跟踪分析师 Mick Strautmann 这样指出。巴西正在用美国柴油替代俄罗斯柴油，进一步挤压大西洋沿岸的买家。Vortexa 还指出，随着炼油厂把柴油产量置于航空煤油和汽油之上，损失可能会进一步向其他成品油产品蔓延。

paragraphs.en: If the shooting stops in the Gulf and Hormuz reopens reliably, Asian refining resurges and Russian output recovers, supply will return just as the summer ends. But those are big ifs. A less benign scenario would oblige America—the world’s swing exporter—and importers to draw down already low stocks. Eventually product prices would jump further, squashing demand and encouraging refineries to produce more (in which case crude prices would also rise). The biggest oil shock in history is not over. The mood of motorists in America and Europe still hangs on battles thousands of miles away.■
paragraphs.zh: 如果海湾停火并且霍尔木兹海峡稳定重开，亚洲炼油将反弹，俄罗斯产量也会恢复，供应将在夏季结束时回归。但这些都要建立在许多前提之上。一个不太乐观的情形将迫使美国——世界上最关键的“摇摆”石油出口国——以及各大进口国动用已经偏低的库存。最终，成品油价格会进一步上升，压缩需求，并促使炼油厂加大产量（在这种情况下，原油价格也会随之上涨）。历史上最大的石油冲击尚未结束。美国和欧洲的消费者情绪，依旧受制于数千英里之外的博弈。■

paragraphs.en: For more expert analysis of the biggest stories in economics, finance and markets, sign up to Money Talks, our weekly subscriber-only newsletter.
paragraphs.zh: 如需获取更多关于经济、金融与市场重大事件的专家解读，请订阅《Money Talks》，我们每周仅限订阅者阅读的通讯。

articles.title_en: China’s trade gap is narrowing. And other surprises
articles.title_zh: 中国的贸易逆差正在收窄。还有其他意外
articles.rubric_en: The world’s second-biggest economy is stumbling into fiscal austerity
articles.rubric_zh: 世界第二大经济体正在步入财政紧缩境地

paragraphs.en: China’s GDP growth figures are often suspiciously smooth. Last year the government set a target of 5%—and the sprawling $19trn economy duly grew by just that amount, as if the combined endeavours of 760m workers and 30m corporations could be choreographed by a committee. This year the government has permitted itself half a percentage point of drama, setting a target range of 4.5-5%. Few think the official outcome will depart far from this interval.
paragraphs.zh: 中国的GDP增长数字常常显得诡异地平稳。去年政府定下5%的目标，而这座拥有约1.9万亿美元规模（约19万亿美元）且规模庞大的经济体正好增长了这个百分点，仿佛760万? 不，760m（7.6亿）名劳动者和3000万家企业的合力都能由一个委员会统一编排。今年政府给自己留了半个百分点的“戏剧性”空间，设定了4.5%到5%的目标区间。很少有人认为官方结果会离这个区间太远。

paragraphs.en: The GDP numbers for the second quarter, released on July 15th, therefore raised a few eyebrows. The economy grew by 4.3%, year on year. That is hardly a disaster. But it was slower than expected and the weakest since 2022, when China was still imposing citywide lockdowns to fight covid-19.
paragraphs.zh: 因此，7月15日公布的第二季度GDP数据让不少人皱起了眉头。按同比口径，经济增长了4.3%。这绝不是一场灾难，但它低于预期，也是自2022年以来最慢的一次增长——当时中国仍在全国范围内实施封城式封控以抗击新冠病毒。

paragraphs.en: Even that disappointing number would not have been possible without help from abroad. Last year’s trade surplus exceeded $1.2trn (see chart 1). And in June goods exports surged by more than a quarter in dollar terms, year on year. As containerfuls of merchandise chug towards their destinations, China’s trading partners, especially the European Union, are bracing themselves for a second “China shock” akin to the upheaval after the country’s entry into the World Trade Organisation in 2001.
paragraphs.zh: 即便是这个让人失望的数字，也不可能在没有外部助力的情况下出现。去年的贸易顺差超过了1.2万亿美元（见图表1）。而在6月，货物出口按美元计算同比增长超过四分之一。随着满满一船货柜驶向目的地，中国的贸易伙伴，尤其是欧盟，正在为“第二次中国冲击”做准备，这次类似于该国于2001年加入世界贸易组织后引发的巨大震荡。

paragraphs.en: But a closer look reveals something different. “China’s trade surplus has peaked,” concludes Adam Wolfe of Absolute Strategy Research, a firm of analysts. In June imports rose faster than exports, by 36%. The surplus in the first half of 2026 was lower, in dollar terms, than a year before.
paragraphs.zh: 但再仔细看就会看到不一样的情况。Absolute Strategy Research 的分析师Adam Wolfe指出，“中国的贸易顺差已经见顶”。6月进口增长快于出口，涨幅为36%。按美元计量，2026年上半年顺差低于一年前。

paragraphs.en: The Iran war is only partly responsible for the turning-point. China is, of course, paying more for oil than it did last year. But it has softened the blow by dramatically cutting the volume of its imports. In explaining the diminishing surplus, crude matters less than chips. China is both a big exporter and a big importer of semiconductors. Its imports of integrated circuits in May, for example, were up by some 70% year on year in dollar terms. That rise was entirely due to higher chip prices.
paragraphs.zh: 伊朗战争仅是转折点形成的部分原因。中国当然比去年为石油支付了更多费用，但它通过大幅削减进口数量来缓冲了影响。解释顺差收窄时，石油作用反而比不上芯片。中国既是半导体的大出口国，也是大进口国。以集成电路为例，中国5月的进口额同比增长了约70%，这全部是由芯片价格上涨所致。

paragraphs.en: China’s overdependence on exports has been clear for some time. Many analysts therefore hope its leaders will turn again to fiscal stimulus to lift domestic spending. Meanwhile, the opposite is happening. The government is stumbling into “de facto austerity”, as Xiangrong Yu and Xinyu Ji of Citigroup, a bank, have put it.
paragraphs.zh: 中国过度依赖出口的问题已经很久以来都很明显。因此，许多分析人士因此希望其领导层再次动用财政刺激措施来提振国内消费。与此同时，发生的却是相反的局面。正如花旗银行的于翔荣和季欣宇所说，政府正“不由自主地”走向事实上的财政紧缩。

paragraphs.en: Tax revenues have grown strongly in recent months. From January to May the authorities gathered 6.2% more in value-added tax and 12.2% more in personal-income taxes than they did a year before. Thanks to energetic trading in China’s stock markets, stamp duties also brought in far more than usual, rising by 89%.
paragraphs.zh: 税收在最近几个月明显增长。1月至5月，政府共征收的增值税比去年同期多6.2%，个人所得税多12.2%。得益于中国股市的活跃交易，印花税的收入也高于往常，增长了89%。

paragraphs.en: Some of this reflects the return of inflation, which increases the nominal value of purchases, boosting VAT. The tax authorities have also put more effort into enforcement. Since last year, for instance, automated text messages have instructed taxpayers to declare all their overseas income and assets going back to 2022.
paragraphs.zh: 其中一部分反映了通胀回升，购买金额在名义上提高，从而推高了增值税。税务部门也加大了征管力度。比如自去年起，税务部门会通过自动短信要求纳税人申报其所有境外收入和资产，并追溯到2022年。

paragraphs.en: So although the central government is spending more, it is also collecting more. The budget deficit, combining central and local governments, has narrowed a little over the past 12 months. That is the opposite of what stimulus requires—and of what a weak economy needs.
paragraphs.zh: 因此，尽管中央政府的支出在增加，但它也在收更多税。过去12个月里，中央和地方政府合并后的财政赤字有所收窄。这与刺激政策所需要的方向相反，也与疲弱经济所需要的方向相反。

paragraphs.en: The mix of fiscal spending has also changed in counterintuitive ways. China’s leader, Xi Jinping, champions high-tech manufacturing, calling on entrepreneurs and local officials to cultivate “new productive forces”. He has also warned in the past against “welfarism”, arguing that handouts can make people lazy. You might assume, then, that public spending had drifted towards technology and education and away from social safety-nets.
paragraphs.zh: 财政支出结构也以一种不直观的方式发生了变化。中国国家主席习近平大力推动高科技制造业，呼吁企业家和地方官员培育“新的生产力”。他过去也曾警告“福利主义”，认为发放补贴会让人变得懒散。由此你可能会猜测，公共支出已经从社会保障网转向科技和教育。

paragraphs.en: But as Citi’s economists point out, the emerging fiscal “pecking order” seems instead to favour social security (which includes pensions, unemployment insurance, anti-poverty handouts and efforts to put people back to work). These items’ share of the government’s main budget has grown in recent years (see chart 2). The slice devoted to technology and education has remained steady, and the share ploughed into infrastructure has declined.
paragraphs.zh: 但正如花旗的经济学家指出，正在出现的财政“优先顺序”似乎反而偏向社会保障（包括养老金、失业保险、反贫困救济以及帮助失业者重新就业的措施）。近年来，这些项目在政府主要预算中的占比有所上升（见图表2）。而用于科技和教育的预算份额则基本持平，基础设施投入的占比则在下降。

paragraphs.en: This picture does not capture everything. It leaves out China’s state-owned enterprises. It also excludes special government funds, which have their own missions and money. Nonetheless, the numbers reveal some fiscal home truths. In a weak economy and an ageing society, the humdrum demands of the elderly, the unemployed and the poor will always make their presence felt, whatever the leader’s preferences. Chinese technology may be white-hot. But its economy is cooling. And its population is increasingly grey.■
paragraphs.zh: 这个图景并未反映全部情况，它忽略了中国的国有企业，也排除了设有专门任务和资金的专项政府基金。尽管如此，数据也揭示了一些财政上的现实：在经济疲软和老龄化社会中，无论领导层偏好如何，老年人、失业者和贫困人口这些看似普通却不容忽视的需求，始终会持续存在。中国的科技或许正处于白热化阶段，但经济正在降温。并且其人口结构也正在进一步老龄化。■

paragraphs.en: For more expert analysis of the biggest stories in economics, finance and markets, sign up to Money Talks, our weekly subscriber-only newsletter.
paragraphs.zh: 如果你想获取更多关于经济、金融和市场领域最重要新闻的专家分析，请订阅《Money Talks》——我们每周的付费订阅通讯。

articles.title_en: Can Kevin Warsh’s Fed force 5 reimagine monetary policymaking?
articles.title_zh: 凯文·瓦什（Kevin Warsh）推动的“第5大道”货币政策会不会改写美联储的政策制定方式？
articles.rubric_en: The new chairman enlists heavy-hitters to fight a handful of gnarly problems
articles.rubric_zh: 这位新主席召集了重量级人物来应对一系列棘手难题

paragraphs.en: FEDERAL RESERVE chairs like to leave a mark. Ben Bernanke, in charge during the global financial crisis of 2007-09, ushered in a formal inflation target and changed how the Fed talked to the world by making its deliberations less opaque. In 2015 his successor, Janet Yellen, raised interest rates after seven years near zero. Jerome Powell, who came next, launched the Fed’s first comprehensive review of its monetary-policy framework.
paragraphs.zh: 美联储主席们喜欢留下自己的印记。2007年至2009年全球金融危机期间掌舵的本·伯南克（Ben Bernanke）引入了正式的通胀目标，并通过让决策讨论变得不那么不透明，改变了美联储与外界的沟通方式。2015年，他的继任者珍妮特·耶伦（Janet Yellen）在隔了七年接近零利率后提高了利率。接任后的杰罗姆·鲍威尔（Jerome Powell）则启动了美联储历史上第一次全面的货币政策框架审查。

paragraphs.en: Kevin Warsh, the new chair, also has big ideas. One is to limit how much of its internal deliberations the Fed reveals, on the grounds that public pronouncements subsequently may make it harder for policymakers to revise their views. Another is to subject the Fed to more open external scrutiny. To that less controversial end, on July 9th Mr Warsh announced the formation of five task-forces which will review critical areas of monetary policy.
paragraphs.zh: 新任主席凯文·瓦什（Kevin Warsh）同样有宏大的想法。其中之一是限制美联储公开披露其内部讨论的内容，理由是公开表态之后，政策制定者可能会更难在后续修正观点。另一个想法则是让美联储接受更公开的外部审视。为实现后一个相对不那么具争议的目标，7月9日瓦什宣布成立五个工作组，分别审视货币政策中的关键领域。

paragraphs.en: Such brains trusts are not a new idea. In 2014 Mr Warsh, who served as a Fed governor in the financial crisis, was himself invited by the Bank of England to join one reviewing its communication practices. But whereas his predecessors at the Fed have always listened to leading figures in academic economics, business and finance behind closed doors, Mr Warsh has handed them a microphone.
paragraphs.zh: 这种“智囊团”做法并不是什么新鲜事。2014年，曾在金融危机期间担任美联储理事的瓦什本人曾受邀加入英格兰银行（Bank of England）的一个评估其沟通惯例的工作组。不同的是，与历任美联储主席一直在闭门状态下听取学术经济、商界和金融界的顶尖人士意见不同，瓦什把麦克风交到了他们手里。

paragraphs.en: Each task-force is led by a trio of notables. The one looking at how the Fed communicates includes two former central-bank presidents (from Brazil and Britain). A fellow ex-head (from India) co-chairs the team examining the Fed’s bloated balance-sheet. The former boss of Walmart, America’s biggest supermarket, will help run the group investigating alternative data sources. The group exploring the impact of artificial intelligence on jobs and productivity is co-led by an eminent Stanford University economist on secondment to Anthropic, a top AI lab, an even more eminent Silicon Valley venture capitalist and a Microsoft executive. A Nobel prizewinner is among the trio leading the task-force on understanding the causes of inflation.
paragraphs.zh: 每个工作组都由三位知名人士领衔。负责研究美联储沟通方式的工作组包括两位前央行行长（来自巴西和英国）。另一组由一位前印度央行行长共同主持，专门审查美联储臃肿的资产负债表。前沃尔玛（Walmart）老板——美国最大超市的前掌舵人——将帮助推进研究替代性数据来源的组别。研究人工智能对就业和生产率影响的小组由一位现于Anthropic人工智能实验室任职的斯坦福大学著名经济学家，以及更著名的硅谷风险投资家和一位微软高管共同领导。研究通胀成因的工作组三人小组中，也有一位诺贝尔奖得主。

paragraphs.en: These heavy-hitters will, with the help of Fed staffers, cobble together policy recommendations and present these first to the Fed board and then to the public. If things go smoothly, all this will happen by the end of the year.
paragraphs.zh: 在美联储工作人员的协助下，这些重量级成员将把建议拼合成政策方案，先提交给美联储理事会，再提交给公众。如果一切顺利，所有工作都将于今年年底前完成。

paragraphs.en: Going smoothly will, first of all, require reconciling the co-chairs’ often divergent opinions in their areas of expertise. Consider the team tasked with reviewing how the Fed thinks about inflation. Thomas Sargeant of New York University, who won the Nobel prize in 2011 for empirical work on cause and effect in the macroeconomy, is an unabashed fan of inflation targets. William White of the C.D. Howe Institute, a Canadian think-tank, is an equally staunch critic, arguing that targets have played a role in making the world more indebted and exacerbated financial boom-bust cycles. Greg Mankiw of Harvard University, who headed the Council of Economic Advisers under President George W. Bush, is in favour of targets but against spuriously precise ones like the Fed’s 2.0%.
paragraphs.zh: 要顺利推进，首先要在共同主席们在各自专长领域里常常分歧的观点之间达成一致。以负责审视美联储通胀认知方式的团队为例，2011年因宏观经济因果关系的实证研究而获诺贝尔奖的纽约大学托马斯·萨金特（Thomas Sargeant）是坚定的通胀目标支持者；加拿大智库 C.D. Howe 研究院的威廉·怀特（William White）则同样坚定地反对通胀目标，认为这一做法促成了全球更高的债务水平，并加剧了金融市场的繁荣—萧条循环。哈佛大学的格雷格·曼昆（Greg Mankiw），他曾在乔治·W·布什总统时期担任经济顾问委员会主席，则支持设定通胀目标，但反对像美联储那样的“2.0%”这种过于精确的指标。

paragraphs.en: Sparks may likewise fly in the other teams. The possible exception is the one concerned with AI. All its members are, like Mr Warsh, bullish on the technology’s transformative potential, differing only in the degree of bullishness (from the gung-ho venture capitalist, Marc Andreessen, to the more guarded Asha Sharma of Microsoft and Chad Jones, a respected academic economist). Each also has an interest in promoting an optimistic outlook, given their ties to the tech industry.
paragraphs.zh: 在其他小组里，也很可能会出现针锋相对的局面。可能的例外是负责人工智能的团队。该组所有成员都与沃什一样看好这项技术的颠覆性潜力，只是在乐观程度上有差异——从激进的风险资本家马克·安德森（Marc Andreessen）到更为谨慎的微软的阿莎·夏玛（Asha Sharma）以及知名学者经济学家查德·琼斯（Chad Jones）皆是如此。鉴于他们与科技行业的联系，每个人也都有动机去推动更乐观的叙事。

paragraphs.en: They must nevertheless, like their opposite numbers on the other teams, persuade the Fed to take their recommendations seriously—the second prerequisite for the smooth completion of Mr Warsh’s effort. In most cases, notably on the Fed’s balance-sheet and inflation targeting, the conclusions would need the consent of the Fed board or the Federal Open Markets Committee (FOMC), on which Mr Warsh has just one vote out of seven and 12, respectively, to become policy.
paragraphs.zh: 尽管如此，他们同其他小组的成员一样，仍必须说服美联储认真对待自己的建议——这是沃什这项努力顺利完成的第二个前提。多数情况下，尤其是在美联储资产负债表和通胀目标议题上，结论要转化为政策，需要得到美联储理事会或联邦公开市场委员会（FOMC）的同意；而在这两个机构里，沃什各只有七票制和十二票制中的一票。

paragraphs.en: Mr Bernanke famously spent hours discussing proposed changes to which economic forecasts the Fed would publicise, and sought a thumbs-up even from the FOMC’s handful of non-voting members. Given this culture of collegiality, Mr Warsh will have to build consensus around the five sets of conclusions. He will also need to decide how to communicate those conclusions to the world.■
paragraphs.zh: 贝南克先生以长时间讨论美联储将要公布的经济预测内容而闻名，并且甚至会寻求联邦公开市场委员会（FOMC）少数无表决权成员的点头同意。在这种讲求共识的文化中，沃什先生将不得不围绕五项结论达成一致。他还需要决定如何向外界传达这些结论。■

paragraphs.en: For more expert analysis of the biggest stories in economics, finance and markets, sign up to Money Talks, our weekly subscriber-only newsletter.
paragraphs.zh: 如需获取更多关于经济、金融与市场最重磅动态的专家解读，请订阅《Money Talks》：我们每周面向订阅者发布的通讯。

articles.title_en: What investment gurus get wrong
articles.title_zh: 投资大师常见的误区
articles.rubric_en: To see a country’s financial follies, look to its celebrity advisers
articles.rubric_zh: 要看一个国家的金融混乱，看看它的名人顾问就行了

paragraphs.en: FINANCIAL ADVICE was once doled out solely by well-paid professionals, and solely to the wealthy. Then, from the 1980s, celebrity advisers took their tips to large radio and TV audiences, especially in America. Today legions of social-media “finfluencers” spout off recommendations to anyone, anywhere.
paragraphs.zh: 金融建议过去几乎只由受雇甚丰的专业人士提供，也几乎只面向富人。后来，从20世纪80年代开始，名人顾问将建议带到广大广播和电视观众面前，尤其是在美国。如今，大批社交媒体上的“金融网红”随处向任何人、任何地方给出推荐。

paragraphs.en: As in previous decades, the recommendations of investment gurus—how to cut expenses, build a savings fund or avoid scams—are sensible and universal. Beyond the shared basics, though, their counsel differs in telling ways. They may not know it, but they hold up a mirror to their countries’ financial mores, resisting audiences’ vices or accidentally reinforcing them.
paragraphs.zh: 与前几代一样，投资大师的建议——如何削减开支、建立储蓄基金或避免骗局——都很理性，也很普遍。不过，在这些共同的基本原则之外，他们的劝告在许多关键点上却大相径庭。他们或许未意识到，自己正在映照出本国的金钱观，要么有意抵制公众的投机习惯，要么却在不经意间强化了这些习惯。

paragraphs.en: In America no young finfluencer yet matches the stature of Dave Ramsey, a gruff 65-year-old radio star turned podcaster. Much of his advice—offered in a stern, fatherly style—is evergreen, built around emergency funds, sensible saving and buying shares for the long term.
paragraphs.zh: 在美国，迄今还没有任何年轻“金融网红”能与戴夫·拉姆齐匹敌。他是一位声音粗犷的65岁电台明星，后来转型为播客主播。其许多建议——以严厉、父辈式的语气提出——都经得起时间考验，围绕应急储备、理性储蓄以及长期买入股票展开。

paragraphs.en: Mr Ramsey’s guidance, however, is puritanical in its attitude to debt. Sensibly, he urges listeners to pay off high-interest consumer debts early. But he also suggests that anyone already saving for retirement or children’s education should pay off their mortgages as fast as possible, too—even low-interest loans secured before 2022.
paragraphs.zh: 然而，拉姆齐的指导在对待债务问题上带有清教徒式的色彩。他理性地建议听众尽早还清高息消费债务；但他也主张，任何已经在为退休或子女教育攒钱的人，也应尽快偿清房贷，即使是2022年前申请、利率较低的贷款也是如此。

paragraphs.en: The rigid advice is in part a reaction against Americans’ proclivity to spend, spend, spend beyond their means. Even in periods of strong economic growth many households find themselves in financial distress through debt. In the first quarter of 2026, 13% of credit-card balances were 90 days or more overdue, close to the record high from 2010, following the global financial crisis.
paragraphs.zh: 这种严厉的理财建议，在某种程度上是对美国人“花钱、花钱、还要再花钱”这一超前消费倾向的反应。即使在经济增长强劲的时期，许多家庭也会因为债务而陷入经济困境。在2026年第一季度，信用卡欠款中有13%逾期90天或更久，接近2009—2010年全球金融危机后创下的历史高位。

paragraphs.en: Britain’s undisputed heavyweight financial guru is Martin Lewis, the founder of “Money Saving Expert”, a website. He channels a different failing: an aversion to investment. Mr Lewis’s stock-in-trade is practical penny-pinching: supermarket bargains, introductory offers and the benefits of switching banks or utility providers. By his own account, until recently he barely touched the stock market. Only in the past year has he turned his attention to Britain’s individual savings accounts for shares, a generous scheme that allows people to invest up to £20,000 ($26,700) per year without incurring the usual investment taxes.
paragraphs.zh: 英国公认的理财界重量级人物是马丁·刘易斯（Martin Lewis），他是网站“Money Saving Expert”的创始人。马丁的理财方式强调另一种缺陷：对投资的厌恶。他的看家本领是实用的精打细算：超市里的低价商品、入门赠送活动，以及更换银行或公用事业服务商所带来的优惠。按他自己的说法，他直到最近才几乎不碰股市。只有在过去一年里，他才把注意力转向了英国的个人股票储蓄账户（ISA），这是一个慷慨的制度，允许人们每年投资最多20,000英镑（约26,700美元）而不必缴纳通常的投资税。

paragraphs.en: The attitude of Mr Lewis reflects the bleak reality that many Brits own barely any equities. A measly 13% of the financial assets of British households are shares, the lowest in almost any large developed economy. In Ramseyan America the figure is 44%. No amount of scrimping and saving will compensate Britons for missing out on the profound benefits of long-term compound returns.
paragraphs.zh: 刘易斯的态度反映出一个严峻现实：许多英国人几乎不持有股票。英国家庭金融资产中仅有可怜的13%是股票，这是几乎所有大型发达经济体中最低的比例。相比之下，在 Ramseyan America，这一数字是44%。再多的精打细算和储蓄也无法弥补英国人错过长期复利回报这一深远好处的代价。

paragraphs.en: Asian personal-finance sages often pepper advice with research on individual stocks. Rachana Phadke Ranade, a chartered accountant with 5.4m YouTube followers, is one of India’s most prominent finfluencers. Her videos go beyond staid book-keeping counsel into initial public offerings, stock-market sectors and commodities. Subscriber-only videos focus on stocks of the month. South Korea’s 3PRO TV, a YouTube channel with 3m subscribers, likewise publishes several videos a day, often on market-moving news about the country’s chipmaking giants, Samsung and SK Hynix. It also sells its own investment seminars.
paragraphs.zh: 亚洲的个人理财大师则常常在建议中夹带个股研究。印度最具知名度的金融意见领袖之一是拉查娜·帕德克·拉纳德（Rachana Phadke Ranade），她是一名特许会计师，在YouTube上拥有540万粉丝。她的视频内容不仅仅是枯燥的记账建议，还会涉及首次公开募股、股市板块以及大宗商品。仅会员可看的视频会聚焦“月度热股”。韩国的3PRO TV是另一个例子：这个拥有300万订阅者的YouTube频道同样几乎每天发布多条视频，经常解读关于三星和SK hynix等该国芯片巨头的市场利好消息，也会售卖自家的投资讲座。

paragraphs.en: The advice reflects the financial culture, rather than the other way round. South Koreans and Indians (at least those with financial resources) save more than Americans or Brits, but suffer from a zeal for day-trading, often backed by leverage. About 8.5m Indians traded risky equity derivatives in the last financial year, up from fewer than 1m eight years ago. A study by Indian regulators suggested that for much of that time, nine in ten retail traders have lost money. South Korea’s stock-market boom has been chased—and driven—by an army of small investors, known as gaemi (ants). Between April and June the cumulative loans taken out to invest in stocks hit a record $40.5bn, and many punters are now facing pain as the semiconductor rally turns volatile.
paragraphs.zh: 这种建议更多是反映该国的金融文化，而非由金融文化决定人们行为。韩国人和印度人（至少是有经济实力的人群）比美国人或英国人更愿意储蓄，但却深受日内交易热情驱动，而且常常使用杠杆。上个财年，大约有850万名印度人进行了高风险的股票衍生品交易，这一数字比八年前不足100万的大幅上升。印度监管机构的一项研究显示，在那段时期，大约有十分之九的普通投资者都亏了钱。韩国股市繁荣的热潮由一支被称作 gaemi（“蚂蚁”）的散户投资军团追逐并推动。从4月到6月，用于投资股票的累积借款创下了405亿美元的纪录，随着半导体反弹变得波动，许多交易者现在正面临亏损压力。

paragraphs.en: There is nothing inherently wrong with following short-term market movements. But for most investors, constantly trading shares, let alone derivatives, is as bad an idea as saving too little or prioritising penny-pinching over compound returns. The rules of sound finances are, like Leo Tolstoy’s happy families, alike everywhere. Financial sins are sinful in their own ways—and so it is with financial advice. ■
paragraphs.zh: 跟踪短线行情本身并没有什么本质错误。但对大多数投资者来说，持续买卖股票，甚至更不用说衍生品，和储蓄太少，或是把抠门当成首要目标而忽视复利收益一样，不是什么好主意。健全财务的原则，如同列夫·托尔斯泰所说的幸福家庭那样，在各地都大体相同。金融中的错误各有各的后果，金融建议也一样。

paragraphs.en: Subscribers to The Economist can sign up to our Opinion newsletter, which brings together the best of our leaders, columns, guest essays and reader correspondence.
paragraphs.zh: 《经济学人》的订阅者可以注册我们的《观点》通讯，里面汇集了我们最好的社论、专栏、客座文章和读者来信。

articles.title_en: How to shrink the Fed’s $7trn balance-sheet
articles.title_zh: 如何缩小美联储7000多亿美元的资产负债表
articles.rubric_en: Kevin Warsh will struggle to reverse the effects of bond-buying
articles.rubric_zh: 凯文·沃什将很难扭转购债政策留下的影响

paragraphs.en: IMAGINE A CITY that, after years of drought, floods a river valley and turns it into a vast reservoir. In the decade that follows, houses spread across once-barren hillsides, factories rise where water now flows freely and farmers trade their wells for irrigation canals. Soon, the city is built around abundant water. Then comes a new mayor—an irritable NIMBY who regards the whole expanse as an eyesore. What is the mayor to do?
paragraphs.zh: 想象一座城市，经历多年干旱之后，某天突然泛滥成灾，把河谷冲成一片浩瀚的水库。在随后的十年里，住宅遍布过去贫瘠的山坡，工厂建在原本自由流淌的水面上，农民将井改为灌溉渠道。很快，整座城市都围绕丰沛的水资源重新建成。随后来了新任市长——一个易怒且有“不是我的后院”情结的领导人，他认为这整片广袤景观很碍眼。这样的市长该怎么办？

paragraphs.en: Kevin Warsh, the Federal Reserve’s new chairman, faces a similar dilemma. During the global financial crisis of 2007-09 the Fed first began buying mortgage-backed securities to steady the housing market, and later long-dated Treasuries to stimulate the broader economy—a policy known as quantitative easing (QE). Three rounds of QE between 2009 and 2014, then another during the covid-19 pandemic in 2020, have swelled the Fed’s balance-sheet to $6.7trn, or nearly 21% of GDP. Treasuries account for about two-thirds of its holdings. Ever suspicious of central-bank sprawl, Mr Warsh fumed last year that this was “a proxy for the Fed’s growing imprimatur on the economy”.
paragraphs.zh: 美联储新任主席凯文·沃什正面临一个类似的两难局面。2007—2009年全球金融危机期间，美联储首次开始买入抵押贷款支持证券，以稳住住房市场，随后又购买长期期债券以刺激更广泛的经济活动，这一政策后来被称为量化宽松（QE）。2009年至2014年间推出三轮QE，之后又在2020年新冠疫情期间再进行一轮，使美联储的资产负债表膨胀到6700亿美元，几乎相当于国内生产总值的21%。美国国债约占其持仓的三分之二。一直对央行权力膨胀抱有戒心的沃什去年的评论里抱怨道，这是一种“美联储对经济不断加深管控与背书的替代表现”。

paragraphs.en: In pursuit of a lower waterline Mr Warsh has assembled a task-force of engineers: Karen Dynan of Harvard University, Raghuram Rajan, an ex-head of India’s central bank, and Jeremy Stein, a former Fed governor. Can the task be done safely?
paragraphs.zh: 为了把“水位”降下来，沃什召集了一支由“工程师”组成的小组：哈佛大学的卡伦·戴南、印度前央行行长拉胡拉姆·拉詹，以及前美联储理事会成员杰里米·斯坦。这个任务能否安全完成？

paragraphs.en: There are several objections to the Fed’s large balance-sheet. If QE works as a tool of macroeconomic stimulus—a question economists still debate—it does so by distorting the market for long-term debt. If the intervention lasts, so will the distortion. Holding long-term bonds has also proven costly during a period in which interest rates have risen. The Fed pays commercial banks a floating rate of interest on the electronic money it creates to buy bonds, known as “reserves”, which are a liability on its balance-sheet. Yet the yields the Fed earns on its bonds are locked in when they are bought—during the pandemic, at ultra-low levels.
paragraphs.zh: 美联储资产负债表过于庞大有几个问题。如果QE作为宏观刺激工具有效——这是经济学界仍在争论的话题——其作用机制就是扭曲长期债务市场。如果这种干预持续下去，扭曲也会持续。并且，在利率上升阶段，持有长期债券也被证明成本高昂。美联储在其买入债券时所创造的电子货币“储备金”上，按浮动利率支付给商业银行利息，而这部分属于其负债。可美联储从债券上获得的收益率却是在购买时就已锁定的，当时正值疫情期间，利率处于极低水平。

paragraphs.en: Mr Warsh’s main concern, however, is institutional. Although the Fed buys government bonds in secondary markets rather than directly from the Treasury, owning trillions of dollars’ worth can still make it look like Uncle Sam’s piggy bank. For now, notes Darrell Duffie of Stanford University, “these criticisms are mostly about perceptions”—more eyesore than menace.
paragraphs.zh: 然而，沃什先生的主要担忧是制度层面的。虽然美联储是在二级市场购买国债，而不是直接从财政部购买，但仅拥有数万亿美元规模的资产仍然可能让外界看起来像是“萨姆大叔的钱包”在发言。斯坦福大学的达雷尔·达菲（Darrell Duffie）指出，目前这些批评“大多是基于观感的”，更像是让人不舒服的景观，而不是真正的威胁。

paragraphs.en: To limit the risk that, in Mr Duffie’s words, the perceptions “someday become reality”, the balance-sheet must shrink. The assets cannot decline unless liabilities do, too, so the question is how much room there is on the other side of the ledger. Currency in circulation makes up about $2.5trn of the Fed’s liabilities and cannot be shrunk. The Treasury’s deposit account at the Fed adds another $800bn or so and may offer some wriggle room. The largest liability is reserves, which have risen from around $10bn before the global financial crisis to about $3.1trn today. For the balance-sheet to shrink, these must be drained from banks.
paragraphs.zh: 为了降低达菲先生所说的那种“某天会变成现实”的观感风险，美联储的资产负债表必须缩小。负债也必须同步减少，否则资产无法下降，因此问题是账簿另一端到底还有多少可用空间。流通中的货币约占美联储负债的2.5万亿美元，无法缩减。财政部在美联储的存款账户又增加了约8000亿美元，可能提供一些活动空间。最大的一项负债是准备金，金融危机前约为1000亿美元，如今已升至约3.1万亿美元。若要压缩资产负债表，这部分必须从银行体系中抽离。

paragraphs.en: The trouble is that just as the city was gradually moulded around abundant water, the banking system is now built around abundant reserves. Before the financial crisis, reserves paid no interest, so a bank with more than it needed would try to lend them to others and earn the short-term interest rate prevailing in the interbank, or “federal funds” market. As QE flooded the system, the Fed kept control of short-term rates by paying interest on reserves, reducing banks’ incentive to lend them to others. New liquidity regulations pushed in the same direction: for example, banks must show that they can meet their needs using their own liquid assets. Large reserve buffers have thus become the norm.
paragraphs.zh: 问题在于，就像城市逐步围绕充沛的水源建成一样，银行体系如今也围绕充足的准备金而建立。金融危机前，准备金不计利息，因此银行若持有超出需要的准备金，通常会借给其他银行，并在同业拆借或“联邦基金”市场上赚取当时的短期利率。随着量化宽松（QE）涌入体系，美联储通过支付准备金利息来维持短期利率的控制，削弱了银行把准备金借给其他机构的激励。同样的新流动性监管也朝这个方向推进：例如，监管要求银行证明其可以使用自身的流动性资产来满足需求。因此，较大的准备金缓冲已成为常态。

paragraphs.en: Banks also adapted their businesses to the new regime. When the Fed bought Treasuries from non-bank investors, the proceeds often landed in those investors’ bank accounts as uninsured deposits. This funding in turn allowed banks to expand their investment portfolios and extend more credit. Mr Rajan says this leads to the “ratcheting” effect: each round of QE left banks dependent on a higher level of reserves.
paragraphs.zh: 银行也把业务模式调整到这种新制度下了。当美联储从非银行投资者手中买入国债时，这笔款项常常会以未受保险存款的形式进入这些投资者在银行中的账户。反过来，这种资金来源使银行得以扩大投资组合并发放更多信贷。拉詹（Rajan）先生称这会产生“阶梯式”效应：每一轮量化宽松都会让银行对更高水平的准备金形成持续依赖。

paragraphs.en: As with draining a reservoir, judging how low the level can now fall without causing collapse is hard. During its first attempt to unwind QE, between 2017 and 2019, the Fed reduced reserves gradually, hoping to leave enough for the financial system to function. But in September 2019 reserves ran short and overnight interest rates spiked. Strains reappeared last year, as reserves neared the low-water mark. The Fed responded by buying Treasury bills at a pace of around $40bn a month from mid-December to mid-April, expanding its balance-sheet again to top up the reserve pool.
paragraphs.zh: 就像给水库放水一样，要判断现在水位还能降到什么程度而又不至于造成系统崩溃并不容易。2017年至2019年间，美联储在首次尝试退出量化宽松政策时逐步减少储备金，希望留出足够的储备金以让金融体系继续运转。但2019年9月储备金趋紧，隔夜利率急速上升。去年，当储备金再次接近低位时，这种压力又重新出现。美联储随即于12月中旬到次年4月中旬期间，以每月约400亿美元的速度购买国库券，使资产负债表再次扩大，以补充储备金池。

paragraphs.en: Stephen Miran, another former Fed governor and a critic of balance-sheet bloat, wants the Fed to cut the interest rate paid on reserves below what banks could earn by lending them in the federal-funds market. Mr Duffie favours updating Fed software to offset incoming and outgoing payments before they are settled, allowing banks to operate with smaller buffers (the Bank of England and European Central Bank have such systems). Mr Rajan has mused about the Fed letting the first institution caught in a crisis topple, as a way to discipline banks from taking too much risk in a world where abundant reserves encourage credit growth.
paragraphs.zh: 另一位前任美联储理事、也是资产负债表膨胀批评者的斯蒂芬·米兰（Stephen Miran）主张，美联储应把支付给储备金的利率降到低于银行在联邦基金市场放贷所能获得的利率。道菲（Mr Duffie）则主张更新美联储的软件，在支付和收款结算前进行对冲，以便银行可以用更小的缓冲金运作（英格兰银行和欧洲央行已经有此类系统）。拉詹（Mr Rajan）曾思考过让第一家在危机中倒下的机构“先倒掉”，作为对银行的纪律约束，因为充沛的储备金会助长信贷增长并鼓励过度冒险。

paragraphs.en: Everyone agrees that any change will take time. Even Mr Warsh has acknowledged that a balance-sheet expanded over 18 years will take “more than 18 weeks” to shrink. Rather than drain the reservoir, he may settle for changing its composition. This could mean replacing long-dated bonds with short-term Treasury bills as they mature, which would reduce the Fed’s influence over longer-term borrowing costs while leaving the balance-sheet’s size unchanged. That would not lower the waterline. But it might improve the view.■
paragraphs.zh: 各方都认同任何调整都需要时间。连沃什本人也承认，一个在18年间不断扩张的资产负债表要缩小，“需要超过18周”。他可能不会真正抽干这口“水库”，而是转而调整其结构。具体做法可能是让长期债券在到期时被短期国库券替换，这会使美联储对长期借贷成本的影响减弱，同时资产负债表规模不变。这样做并不能降低“水位线”，但可能让局势看起来更好。■

paragraphs.en: Subscribers to The Economist can sign up to our Opinion newsletter, which brings together the best of our leaders, columns, guest essays and reader correspondence.
paragraphs.zh: 《经济学人》订阅者可以注册我们的《评论》通讯，阅读我们最好的社评、专栏、客座文章和读者来信。

articles.title_en: The rate at which Earth is absorbing energy is alarming climate scientists
articles.title_zh: 地球吸收能量的速度正在使气候科学家警觉
articles.rubric_en: Reflections on a warming planet
articles.rubric_zh: 关于一个变暖行星的思考

paragraphs.en: IN APRIL the crew of Artemis II showed that Earth’s loveliness from afar, originally revealed by the Moon-bound Apollo missions of the 1960s and 1970s, remains one of the space age’s enduring truths. The home planet’s intricate, swirling, colourful complexities turned out to offer just as wonderful a contrast to the sloe-black of space and the drab dull Moon today as they did when seen half a century ago.
paragraphs.zh: 在4月，阿耳忒弥斯二号（Artemis II）的机组再次展示了地球从遥远太空中的迷人景象。这样的景象最早在20世纪60至70年代的登月阿波罗任务中被揭示，后来也被反复印证，并且仍然是太空时代仍旧成立的真相之一。如今这颗家园行星精妙、旋涡般、色彩斑斓的复杂面貌，与半个世纪前一样，在从远处望去时，也同深邃的黑空和今天黯淡无光的月球形成了同样令人惊叹的对比。

paragraphs.en: More prosaic observations from space, though, reveal a disturbing change. They show that the brightness with which that beauty burns is dimming. Seen from afar, Earth is looking steadily darker.
paragraphs.zh: 然而，更平实的太空观测却揭示出一个令人不安的变化。它们显示，这份美丽所散发出的光芒正在变暗。从遥远处看，地球正逐渐变得更暗。

paragraphs.en: Evidence of this dimming comes from a project called Clouds and the Earth’s Radiant Energy System (CERES). Since the end of the 1990s the CERES team at NASA, America’s space agency, has been using instruments on various satellites to do some basic planetary book-keeping. They measure the incoming sunshine (visible light and shortwave infrared) and the fraction of this that gets reflected back into space. They also measure the amount of energy shed by the planet itself. Everything with a temperature radiates energy. Earth does so in the longwave part of the infrared.
paragraphs.zh: 这一变暗现象有证据来自“云与地球辐射能量系统”（CERES）计划。自20世纪90年代末以来，NASA——美国国家航空航天局——的CERES团队一直在利用不同卫星上的仪器进行一种基础的行星收支核算。他们测量入射的阳光（可见光和短波红外），以及其中被反射回太空的比例。同时，他们也测量地球自身散发出的能量总量。任何有温度的事物都会辐射能量，地球就是在红外的长波段这样做。

paragraphs.en: The amount of sunshine reflected is known as the albedo. This is going down. Everything not reflected is absorbed, so the energy absorbed is going up. Think of it as energy income. The heat given off in the infrared, which represents the planet’s outgoings, is also increasing. As Earth gets hotter the laws of thermodynamics require it to put out more infrared, and though greenhouse gases stymie this response they cannot entirely negate it.
paragraphs.zh: 被反射回去的阳光比例被称为“反照率”（albedo）。这个数值正在下降。没有被反射的部分就会被吸收，因此吸收的能量也在上升。可以把它理解为“能量收入”。而以长波红外形式向外散发的热量，也就是地球的“能量支出”，同样在增加。地球变得更热后，热力学定律要求它必须放出更多红外辐射；虽然温室气体会阻碍这一过程，但它们无法完全抵消这种变化。

paragraphs.en: But the increased outgoings have not kept up with the increased income. In book-keeping of the financial sort, as Mr Micawber pointed out, incomings larger than outgoings result in happiness. When it comes to the planet’s energy budget, excessive income heralds misery.
paragraphs.zh: 但增加的支出并没有跟上增加的收入。正如米考伯先生指出的那样，在财务记账中，收入大于支出会带来财富；但在地球的能量收支里，收入过剩预示着痛苦。

paragraphs.en: The energy the planet absorbs but does not re-emit is known as Earth’s energy imbalance (EEI). It is the fundamental driver of climate change. If Earth’s energy accounts were balanced, there would be no long-term alteration of the climate. When the accounts fall out of balance, however, so do matters climatic. And if an imbalance goes on growing then, other things being equal, the climate will be driven further and further from its original state. Which is bad, for the measurements show the EEI has more than doubled since 2000 and continues to grow (see chart 1).
paragraphs.zh: 地球吸收却未重新发出的能量被称为地球能量失衡（EEI）。它是气候变化的根本驱动力。如果地球的能量账目保持平衡，气候就不会发生长期变化。然而一旦收支失衡，气候形势也会随之改变。如果这种失衡持续扩大，在其他条件不变的情况下，气候将会越来越远离原本的状态。这很糟糕，因为观测数据显示，EEI 自2000年以来已增长了一倍以上，并且仍在上升（见图表1）。

paragraphs.en: Until recently the EEI was more or less entirely a theoretical thing. Before satellites, the best way of measuring the whole Earth’s albedo was by training telescopes on the Moon to measure “Earthshine”—light reflected first from Earth to the Moon and then from the Moon back to Earth. Only with CERES (which still sneaks the occasional peak at the Moon for calibration purposes) were consistent long-term measurements of it possible.
paragraphs.zh: 直到最近，EEI 几乎完全是一个理论概念。过去在卫星时代之前，测量整个地球反照率的最好方法，是把望远镜对准月亮，测量“地球光晕”——先从地球反射到月球，再从月球反射回地球的光。只有在 CERES（该卫星仍会为了校准而偶尔对准月亮并记录一次峰值）出现后，才可能进行长期一致的测量。

paragraphs.en: Those measurements are, moreover, vouched for by data from a completely different source. Since the turn of the century an international programme called Argo has launched thousands of floats, which drift around the oceans measuring temperature, salinity and other things at depths of up to 6km. Since more than 90% of the energy absorbed by Earth goes into the oceans, most of the extra energy now being taken in should end up there, too. Argo’s measurements confirm that it does, tallying closely with the CERES data.
paragraphs.zh: 此外，这些测量结果还得到了完全不同来源数据的佐证。自本世纪初以来，一个名为 Argo 的国际计划已经放入海洋数千个漂流浮标，它们在海洋中漂流并测量最高可达6公里深处的温度、盐度等参数。由于地球吸收的能源中有90%以上进入海洋，目前新增的能量也理应主要存储在那里。Argo 的观测证实了这一点，并且与 CERES 的数据高度一致。

paragraphs.en: Armed with a couple of decades of results from both sources, scientists now feel they have a real handle on what the EEI is doing. And what it is doing alarms them. “For the first time we’re interpreting measurements,” says Bjorn Stevens, who runs the Max Planck Institute for Meteorology in Hamburg. “That’s a game changer for me.” And if it is scientifically exciting, the new game also looks alarming.
paragraphs.zh: 凭借来自这两类数据源的数十年结果，科学家们现在觉得自己终于真正掌握了地球能量失衡（EEI）到底在发生什么，而这让他们感到不安。汉堡马克思·普朗克气象研究所所长 Bjorn Stevens 表示：“这是我们第一次能够解释测量结果。” 他补充说：“这对我来说是一次真正的转折。” 如果说这在科学上令人兴奋，那么这场“新博弈”看起来也同样令人警觉。

paragraphs.en: This alarm takes two linked but distinct forms. The first is the likelihood that, even as the coming decade sees greenhouse-gas emissions level off and perhaps start to fall, the rate at which Earth’s surface temperature is rising will continue to quicken. Though changes in the EEI do not feed through into global temperatures in a straightforward way, feed through they do. Reto Knutti, a climate scientist at ETH Zurich, says the rate at which the EEI is going up suggests that near-term warming could be anywhere from 10% more to 30% more than the current consensus.
paragraphs.zh: 这种警惕主要有两种相互关联但又不同的表现。第一种是这种可能性：即便未来十年温室气体排放量会趋于平稳，甚至可能开始下降，地表温度上升的速度仍会持续加快。虽然 EEI 的变化并不会以简单直接的方式传导到全球气温上，但它们确实会传导。苏黎世联邦理工学院（ETH Zurich）的气候科学家 Reto Knutti 表示，EEI 的上升速度表明，近期变暖幅度可能比目前共识高出 10% 到 30%。

paragraphs.en: Evidence of such increases may well be here already. El Niño events drive up the world’s average surface temperature (and do a lot else besides) by moving heat stored in lower parts of the tropical Pacific into the ocean’s top 100 metres. In the El Niño of 2023, with Earth’s albedo the lowest ever recorded, the top of the ocean was getting a great deal of heat from elsewhere, too. A study by Minobe Shoshiro of Hokkaido University and his colleagues suggests the EEI’s contribution to upper-ocean heating when that El Niño got started was 75% higher than had been the case for this century’s previous El Niño.
paragraphs.zh: 这种增加的迹象可能已经出现。厄尔尼诺现象会把储存在热带太平洋低层海域的热量输送到海洋表层 100 米范围内，从而推高全球平均地表温度，并带来其他多方面影响。2023 年的厄尔尼诺期间，地球反照率降至有史以来最低水平，海洋表层也从其他地方获得了大量额外热量。北海道大学的 Minobe Shoshiro 及其同事的一项研究表明，在当时的厄尔尼诺开始阶段，EEI 对上层海洋增暖的贡献，比本世纪此前所有厄尔尼诺事件都高出 75%。

paragraphs.en: Dr Minobe and his colleagues showed that this massive influx of heat explained the increasing frequency of extreme conditions during those two years, which saw records of various kinds set that went well beyond what would be expected on the basis of the trend in surface temperatures. Something similar, Dr Minobe suspects, may be on the cards for this year’s El Niño, which is shaping up to be a whopper.
paragraphs.zh: Minobe 博士及其同事还显示，这股巨大的热量输入解释了这两年极端条件频率增加的原因，当年出现了多项前所未有的纪录，远远超出了仅按地表温度变化趋势所能预期的范围。Minobe 博士推测，今年的厄尔尼诺也可能出现类似情况，而且这一轮厄尔尼诺正在快速“发酵”成一次异常强势的事件。

paragraphs.en: The second form of alarm is the degree to which all this comes as a surprise. Scientists think there are two basic reasons for Earth’s diminishing albedo. One is that stricter controls on the amount of sulphur dioxide emitted from power plants and ocean-going ships have led to fewer toxic, airborne sulphate particles, or “aerosols”. Because those tiny aerosols are also shiny aerosols, this has also made Earth dimmer. The other is that greenhouse-gas-driven climate change reduces the extent of sea-ice, shrinks glaciers and perturbs some types of cloud—all of which reduce the amount of reflected sunlight.
paragraphs.zh: 第二个令人担忧的地方是，这一切让人如此意外。科学家认为地球反照率下降有两个基本原因。一是对电厂和远洋船舶排放二氧化硫的更严格控制，导致有毒的空气中硫酸盐颗粒物，或称“气溶胶”，减少。由于这些微小的气溶胶同样属于反射性气溶胶，这也使地球变得更暗。另一方面，温室气体驱动的气候变化会减少海冰范围、缩小冰川，并扰动某些类型的云——这些都会降低反射阳光的数量。

paragraphs.en: The computer models used to understand the climate, and on which the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC) relies for its predictions, capture both of these effects. But they cannot match the magnitude of the observations.
paragraphs.zh: 用于理解气候、以及《政府间气候变化委员会》（IPCC）依赖其作出预测的计算机模型，捕捉到了这两种效应。但它们无法与观测到的变化幅度相匹配。

paragraphs.en: Late last year more than 50 researchers in the field published a paper which asserted that the “strong upward trend in the imbalance is difficult to reconcile with climate models. [We are now left in] little doubt that the real world signal has left the envelope of model internal variability.”
paragraphs.zh: 去年年底，领域内50多位研究人员发表了一篇论文，文中断言：“不平衡不断增强的强上升趋势难以与气候模型协调。[我们现在已经明确，现实世界的信号]已超出模型内部变率所能解释的范围。”

paragraphs.en: This is not just a problem for science. As Maria Rugenstein of Colorado State University puts it, “Lots of people are using these models for impact assessment, for carbon budgets—for anything we say about the future, we use these models which cannot reproduce the currently observed energy imbalance.”
paragraphs.zh: 这不仅仅是科学研究的问题。正如科罗拉多州立大学的Maria Rugenstein所说：“很多人都在用这些模型做影响评估、做碳预算——任何关于未来的判断，我们都依赖这些模型，但这些模型无法重现当前观测到的能量失衡。”

paragraphs.en: This March Dr Stevens convened a meeting in Schloss Ringberg, a castle overlooking the Tegernsee, a lake in Bavaria, at which experts discussed the possible roles of clouds and sulphate particles—which, to climate scientists, are two quite different types of thing.
paragraphs.zh: 今年三月，斯蒂文斯博士在巴伐利亚泰格恩湖畔的施洛斯·林格贝格城堡召开了一场会议。与会专家讨论了云和硫酸盐颗粒物可能发挥的作用——在气候科学界，前者和后者本质上是两种完全不同的东西。

paragraphs.en: Sulphates are a so-called forcing—a change in the way energy flows through the system which is imposed from the outside. Cloud changes are feedbacks—responses to such impositions which either amplify or damp down their effects. If climate models are not producing the EEI seen in the real world, the likelihood is that they are either underestimating the cooling effects of the sulphate forcing, or that they do not accurately capture the feedbacks through which changes in net forcing lead to changes in cloud cover. For a week oceanographers, instrument designers, climate modellers, aerosol experts and atmospheric physicists tussled over the arcana of each other’s work to explain this.
paragraphs.zh: 硫酸盐是一种所谓的“强迫”——也就是外部施加于系统之上的、改变能量流动方式的因素。云变化则属于“反馈”——对这类施加因素的响应，可能会放大或减弱其影响。如果气候模型未能再现现实世界中的 EEI，那么很可能是因为模型低估了硫酸盐强迫所带来的降温效应，或者没有准确捕捉到净强迫变化如何通过反馈机制导致云量变化。一个星期里，海洋学家、仪器设计师、气候模型专家、气溶胶研究者和大气物理学家在会议上反复争论彼此研究中的技术细节，试图给出解释。

paragraphs.en: The explanation which garnered most support, according to a straw poll Dr Stevens conducted at the end of the week, was that the sulphate forcing was being miscalculated. Various measurements needed for the calculations are hard to make. “A lot of the components are not very well observed, if they’re observed at all,” says Chris Smith, who works on the matter at IIASA, an international research institute based in Austria. Aerosols are mobile but short-lived. They can travel thousands of kilometres from their source, but not the tens of thousands needed to spread around the world like greenhouse gases. This means that their effects are patchy.
paragraphs.zh: 斯蒂文斯博士在周末进行的投票中显示，得到最多支持的解释是硫酸盐强迫被计算错误。为这些计算所需的各种观测数据都很难获取。奥地利的国际研究机构 IIASA 从事该课题的克里斯·史密斯表示，“许多组成成分都观察得不够好，如果有被观察到的话。” 气溶胶是可移动的，但寿命较短。它们可以从源头移动数千公里，却不足以像温室气体那样传播到全球数万公里范围，因此其影响具有斑块式特征。

paragraphs.en: They are also various. The basic effect is directly reflecting sunlight back into space. But they have indirect effects on clouds as well, and those seem to produce more of the cooling. The properties—and sometimes the very existence—of low clouds depend on the availability of aerosols on which water vapour can condense into droplets. This means that, if they are in the right place, aerosols can brighten clouds, lengthen their lives or even bring them into existence from scratch. But all this, again, is difficult to measure.
paragraphs.zh: 它们也各不相同。其基本作用是直接把阳光反射回太空，但它们对云的间接影响也很明显，而这些影响似乎带来更多降温。低云的属性，甚至其存在与否，都取决于可供水汽凝结成水滴的气溶胶是否充足。这意味着，只要位置合适，气溶胶就能使云更亮、延长云寿命，甚至从无到有地促成云的形成。但是，像这些效应一样，相关量再一次难以精确测量。

paragraphs.en: Øivind Hodnebrog of CICERO, Norway’s main climate-research institute, and his colleagues rooted through data and models to try to form a coherent picture of the aerosols’ decline. They concluded that half the increase in the EEI trend between 2001 and 2019 could be ascribed to the cleaning up of the air, and that past estimates of this change in forcing had been 10-40% too low.
paragraphs.zh: 挪威主要气候研究机构CICERO的Øivind Hodnebrog及其同事通过梳理数据和模型，试图勾画出气溶胶减少这一现象的完整图景。研究人员得出的结论是，2001年至2019年间地球能量不平衡（EEI）上升趋势的一半，可归因于空气质量改善；而此前对此强迫（辐射影响）变化的估算，普遍偏低了10%到40%。

paragraphs.en: Since 2019, when that study ended, abatement has continued apace. Worldwide sulphur emissions have fallen from 81m tonnes to 69m. Much of that was a result of new controls on sulphur emissions from ships, which were imposed in 2020 by the International Maritime Organisation (IMO). Sulphates from ships on the high seas are particularly powerful forcers, largely because the scarcity of other nearby aerosol sources increases the marginal effect of the added ones.
paragraphs.zh: 自2019年那项研究结束以来，减排行动持续推进。全球硫排放从8100万吨降至6900万吨。其主要原因之一是2020年国际海事组织（IMO）对船舶排放硫的实施新管制。来自公海船舶的硫酸盐是一类尤其强的气溶胶强迫源，这主要是因为在缺乏其他附近气溶胶来源时，新增加的这类排放会产生更高的边际效应。

paragraphs.en: Researchers estimate that the IMO’s 2020 regulations reduced sulphur-related cooling by more than 10%. That is a bigger change to the climate than any measures taken on carbon dioxide have had. Unfortunately, it is in the wrong direction.
paragraphs.zh: 研究人员估算，IMO于2020年出台的法规使与硫相关的降温效应减少了10%以上。这一变化对气候的影响，比迄今为止针对二氧化碳采取的任何措施都更大。不幸的是，它朝着错误的方向发展。

paragraphs.en: What then of the feedbacks? Cloud cover has certainly been changing. Last year Helge Gössling of the Alfred Wegener Institute and his colleagues analysed cloud patterns for 2023, a year when temperatures hit a record high, the albedo a record low and the EEI a level that not one of the models relied on by the IPCC could match. They found a striking dearth of low-level clouds over some bits of ocean.
paragraphs.zh: 那么反馈机制如何？云层覆盖确实在变化。去年的研究中，阿尔弗雷德·韦格纳研究所（AWI）的Helge Gössling及其同事分析了2023年的云图。2023年气温创下历史新高，地表反照率降至历史低位，而地球能量不平衡（EEI）却达到一个没有哪一个被IPCC采用的模型能够匹配的水平。研究人员发现，某些海域的低层云出现了明显的稀缺。

paragraphs.en: A more recent, long-term assessment of the role of low clouds, by Paulo Ceppi of Imperial College, London, put that result into the context of a two-decade trend. It found this trend did indeed have a significant effect on the EEI, one which seems to explain about half of its growth. But it also found the trend’s strength was no larger than models predict.
paragraphs.zh: 帝国理工学院（伦敦）的保罗·塞皮（Paulo Ceppi）对低层云作用进行的近期长期评估，将该结果置于二十年趋势中加以解读。研究发现，这一趋势确实对 EEI 产生了显著影响，并且似乎可以解释其增长的大约一半。然而，它也发现，这种趋势的强度并不比模型预测的更大。

paragraphs.en: If sulphates can explain about half the growth in the EEI, as Dr Hodnebrog and his colleagues argue, and clouds can explain about half, that might seem to wrap things up. The climate remains bad and, as sulphur emissions fall yet further, things are sure to get worse. But the explanations themselves seem fine.
paragraphs.zh: 如果硫酸盐能够解释 EEI 增长的大约一半，正如霍内布罗格博士（Dr Hodnebrog）及其同事所论证的那样，而云又能解释大约一半，这似乎似乎可以一刀切地解决问题。气候仍然很糟糕，并且随着硫排放进一步下降，局势注定会恶化。只是这些解释本身似乎都说得通。

paragraphs.en: Unfortunately it is not quite that simple. For one thing some of the cloud effects, those caused by fewer aerosols, are counted in both analyses. For another, the thing the models find hardest to reproduce is not the size of the imbalance, but the degree to which it is dominated by the falling albedo. Kyle Armour of the University of Washington says that is what worries him most about the CERES data. “It’s a much larger shortwave-energy [ie, sunshine] accumulation than the models can produce. So whatever the models are doing, they appear to be missing some processes.”
paragraphs.zh: 遗憾的是，事情并不那么简单。首先，部分云效应——那些由气溶胶减少引起的效应——在两项分析中都被重复计算。其次，模型最难复现的并不是能量不平衡的绝对规模，而是它被不断下降的反照率所主导的程度。华盛顿大学的凯尔·阿莫（Kyle Armour）认为这正是他最担心 CERES 数据的地方。正因为如此，他说：“这是一个远大于模型能够产生的短波能量（即阳光）积累。这说明无论模型在做什么，它们似乎都遗漏了某些过程。”

paragraphs.en: Recent work by Gunnar Myhre, also of CICERO, along with Dr Hodnebrog, Norman Loeb of NASA’s Langley Research Centre, who is responsible for the CERES data, and Piers Forster of the University of Leeds, who led the relevant part of the 2021 IPCC report, underlines the point. They looked at how well the models considered by the IPCC dealt with the changing EEI when the rates at which absorbed shortwave and emitted longwave radiation are increasing are separated out.
paragraphs.zh: 塞西罗（CICERO）的古纳·米赫雷（Gunnar Myhre）在与霍内布罗格博士、NASA 兰利研究中心的诺曼·洛布（Norman Loeb，负责 CERES 数据）以及利兹大学的皮尔斯·福斯特（Piers Forster，曾主导 2021 年 IPCC 报告相关部分）合作的最新研究进一步强调了这一点。他们检视了 IPCC 所采用的模型，在分离吸收短波辐射和向外发射长波辐射速率上升的情况下，处理变化中的 EEI 的表现。

paragraphs.en: They concluded that even when the models came close to getting the right EEI, they got there in the wrong way. They tended to have a lower increase in absorption and a lower increase in emission; in balance-sheet terms, less income and less outgoings, even if the gap between the two was almost the same. But if all the models were wrong in the same direction, some were wronger than others. And the most wrong all had one thing in common: low “climate sensitivity”.
paragraphs.zh: 他们得出的结论是，即使这些模型在接近正确的地球能量失衡（EEI）值时，也不是走得对了路。它们往往表现为吸收增加得更少、排放增加也更少；换句话说，像资产负债表一样，收入更低、支出也更低，尽管两者之间的差距几乎一样。不过，如果所有模型都在同一方向上出错，也不意味着错得同样严重。一些模型偏差更大，而偏差最大的那些有一个共同点：气候敏感性“偏低”。

paragraphs.en: Climate sensitivity is a way of thinking about the sum of all feedbacks—an estimate of the temperature rise to be expected for a given increase in forcing. In 2021 the IPCC reckoned that the best estimate of this sensitivity, given understanding of forcing at the time, was 3°C, with a 90% chance of a value between 2°C and 5°C.
paragraphs.zh: 气候敏感性是一种衡量所有反馈效应总和的方式——它估计在某一给定的强迫增量下，预期会出现多少温度上升。2021年，联合国政府间气候变化专门委员会（IPCC）推算，在当时对外部强迫的认知下，这种敏感性的最佳估计值为3°C，且有90%的概率介于2°C到5°C之间。

paragraphs.en: Dr Myhre and his colleagues found that, when judged by their performance on the EEI, models with a sensitivity estimate of less than 2.94ºC could, with high confidence, be ruled out. The IPCC’s best estimate of climate sensitivity is, in other words, the lowest still plausible (see chart 2). Moreover, a recent study led by Gergana Gyuleva, a colleague of Dr Knutti’s at ETH Zurich, using a different measure of climate sensitivity, gets a similar result.
paragraphs.zh: Myhre博士及其同事发现，按模型在EEI上的表现来评判，气候敏感性估计低于2.94ºC的模型可以被高度确定地排除。换言之，IPCC的气候敏感性最佳估计，反而是目前仍可成立的最低值（见图2）。此外，由瑞士苏黎世联邦理工学院（ETH Zurich）Knutti博士的同事Gergana Gyuleva领导的一项近期研究，使用了不同的气候敏感性度量，也得出了相似的结果。

paragraphs.en: A long-time champion of higher climate sensitivities is James Hansen of the Earth Institute at Columbia University. Dr Hansen, a veteran who has been working on climate models and climate sensitivity since the 1970s, thinks the answer to the question “forcings or feedbacks?” is a resounding both. Sulphate effects are big; climate sensitivity is high.
paragraphs.zh: 长期支持更高气候敏感性观点的，是哥伦比亚大学地球研究所的James Hansen博士。作为一位自上世纪70年代起就从事气候模型与气候敏感性研究的资深专家，Hansen博士认为“是外部强迫，还是反馈作用”这个问题的答案是响亮的“两者皆有”。硫酸盐效应很大，气候敏感性也很高。

paragraphs.en: As a result he believes warming is currently growing not at 0.27°C per decade, the rate Dr Forster and his colleagues currently calculate, but at a whopping 0.4°C a decade. On that basis he expects the current El Niño to make both this year and next the hottest on record (most prognosticators think that its full effects will make this happen only next year). His projections see warming since the 19th century reaching 2°C—and thus surpassing the limit enshrined in the Paris agreement on climate in 2015—by the end of the 2030s.
paragraphs.zh: 因此他认为，升温目前并非福斯特博士及其同事目前计算的每十年0.27°C，而是高达每十年0.4°C。基于这一判断，他预计当前的厄尔尼诺现象会让今年和明年都成为有记录以来最热的一年（多数预测者认为其全部影响将在明年才会显现）。他的预测显示，若按此趋势，自19世纪以来的升温到本世纪30年代末将达到2°C，从而突破2015年《巴黎协定》确立的上限。

paragraphs.en: Few of Dr Hansen’s peers agree with all of this. They take issue with the way he derives his high climate sensitivity from analysis of the ice ages and the warm periods between them. According to Dr Armour the pattern of the warming at the end of the most recent ice age did not look like the pattern of warming being seen today.
paragraphs.zh: 很少有汉森博士的同行同意他全部观点。他们反对他从冰河期及其间暖期数据中推算高敏感度的做法。根据阿莫尔博士的说法，在最近一次冰河期末期出现的变暖模式，并不符合今天所看到的变暖模式。

paragraphs.en: Most discussions of climate sensitivity deal in global averages. But it is becoming increasingly clear that patterns matter. The oceans are not warming homogeneously, and some parts of the world are better at losing heat than others.
paragraphs.zh: 大多数关于气候敏感性的讨论都采用全球平均值来处理问题，但人们越来越清楚，区域格局才是真正关键。海洋并不是均匀变暖的，世界的某些地区比其他地区更擅长散失热量。

paragraphs.en: The classic example is the “warm pool” in the western Pacific. Surface heat drives powerful convection into the atmosphere above, producing towering thunderclouds. This convection moves heat up towards the top of the atmosphere very efficiently. And once there that heat is more easily lost to space as infrared. The planet gets a radiator; its climate sensitivity goes down.
paragraphs.zh: 一个经典例子是西太平洋的“暖池”。海表热量会驱动强烈对流，向上输送到其上方的大气，形成高耸的雷雨云。这种对流能非常高效地将热量输送到对流层顶部。一旦热量到达那里，就更容易以红外辐射的形式散失到太空中。此时，地球更像一个散热器，其气候敏感性就会下降。

paragraphs.en: Work by Vince Cooper of MIT, a former student of Dr Armour, applies similar ideas to the end of the ice age. The bits of the sea surface which were most anomalously cold back then were in northern high-latitudes. And for a given amount of warming, a world where that warming is concentrated in the high-latitudes will have a higher climate sensitivity than a world of more homogeneous warming like today’s. The changes in global average temperature seen then do not imply particularly high sensitivity now. In fact, Dr Cooper thinks they suggest that today’s sensitivity is unlikely to be more than 4°C.
paragraphs.zh: 麻省理工学院（MIT）的文斯·库珀（Vince Cooper）的研究，应用了类似思路来分析冰川时代的结束。那时，海洋表面最异常寒冷的区域位于高纬度北方。对于同样幅度的变暖来说，如果升温集中在高纬度地区，那么当时的世界比像今天这样更均匀变暖的世界，具有更高的气候敏感性。于是那时观察到的全球平均温度变化并不一定意味着当今的敏感性特别高。事实上，库珀博士认为，这些证据表明当今的敏感性不太可能超过4摄氏度。

paragraphs.en: But the importance of patterns does not lie only in the past. Dr Rugenstein and others have been working for some time on the problem that the patterns of warming found in climate models do not, by and large, reflect those seen in the real world. And some aspect of this disjunction might explain why the models are not matching the real EEI. At the Ringberg meeting the number of people who thought that pattern effects might yet explain the EEI was smaller than the “forcings are wrong” crowd, but larger than any other group.
paragraphs.zh: 但模式特征的重要性不仅限于过去。鲁根斯坦（Dr Rugenstein）及其他人已经研究了一段时间：气候模型中出现的变暖格局，整体上并未反映现实世界中的格局。这个脱节的某些方面，可能解释了为什么这些模型与真实的EEI不一致。在雷恩贝格（Ringberg）会议上，认为“格局效应”仍可能解释EEI的人数少于认为“强迫项错误”的人，但多于任何其他观点。

paragraphs.en: Unfortunately, it is not clear quite what that explanation would look like—not least because, as Dr Stevens puts it, “No one knows what makes the patterns.” Are they the result of natural variability, with their arrangement over the past few decades—during some of which the warm pool radiator was working very well— largely a matter of chance? Or might they be explained through a mechanism that the models do not yet know how to capture? “My intuition”, says Dr Rugenstein, “is that the models’ ocean heat uptake is wrong.” This would lead to problems with the sea-surface temperature patterns.
paragraphs.zh: 遗憾的是，人们还不清楚这种解释具体会是什么样子——最起码正如史蒂文斯博士所说，“没有人知道是什么造成了这些格局。”这些格局是自然波动的结果吗？过去几十年中它们的排列——其中有些年代海洋热辐射带非常有效——大多只是偶然？还是可以用模型尚未掌握的某种机制来解释？“我的直觉是，”鲁根斯坦博士说，“模型中的海洋吸热过程有误。”这会导致海洋表面温度格局出现问题。

paragraphs.en: Getting models to mirror the way the ocean couples to the atmosphere is a longstanding problem, and one that looks hard to solve. But it matters immensely. The oceans of the dimming Earth have been absorbing ever more energy. They are storing up that energy. Understanding the processes involved is a matter of urgency—and a certain frustration. “What the last 25 years actually tell us about the next 25 years is open,” says Dr Rugenstein. “And that’s embarrassing as a field.”
paragraphs.zh: 让模型真实反映海洋与大气的耦合关系，一直是一个长期存在且看似难以解决的问题。但它的重要性极其关键。正在变暗的地球海洋持续吸收越来越多的能量。它们在储存这些能量。理解其中的过程是当务之急，也令人十分困扰。“过去25年到底告诉我们关于未来25年的信息并不明确，”鲁根斯坦博士说，“这在这个领域是尴尬的。”

paragraphs.en: Last year Dr Stevens and Tiffany Shaw, a researcher at the University of Chicago who looks at predictions of regional climate change, published a paper called “The Other Climate Crisis”. The first climate crisis is familiar enough: the world is heating up quickly. The other crisis, they argue, is in climate science itself, where an accumulation of anomalies suggests that some assumptions needed questioning.
paragraphs.zh: 去年，斯蒂文斯博士和芝加哥大学的研究人员蒂芙妮·肖（Tiffany Shaw）共同发表了一篇题为《另一个气候危机》（The Other Climate Crisis）的论文。第一个气候危机是广为人知的：地球正在快速变暖。另一个危机，如他们所说，则存在于气候科学本身：大量反常现象的累积表明，一些既定假设有必要被重新质疑。

paragraphs.en: Progress in understanding what the increasing amount of energy being stored in Earth’s land, sea and air system is actually going to do, they say, requires climate scientists to concentrate on the processes and predictions where models and data diverge the most. There is no more consequential divergence to get started with than the dimming of Earth. ■
paragraphs.zh: 他们指出，要进一步理解地球陆地、海洋和大气系统中不断增加的储能将会产生什么实际影响，气候科学家必须把更多精力集中在模型与观测数据分歧最大的过程和预测上。与之相比，更值得优先处理、且影响更深远的分歧还没有。最值得从这一点入手的，就是地球变暗问题。■

paragraphs.en: For more coverage of climate change, sign up for the Climate Issue, our fortnightly subscriber-only newsletter, or visit our climate-change hub.
paragraphs.zh: 如需获取更多关于气候变化的报道，请订阅我们每两周一次的《气候议题》付费通讯，或访问我们的气候变化专题中心。

articles.title_en: How to train for a heatwave
articles.title_zh: 如何适应酷热天气
articles.rubric_en: A nice, hot bath can go a long way
articles.rubric_zh: 一场舒适又热的热水澡能带来很大帮助

paragraphs.en: ENGLAND’S football team set up camp in West Palm Beach, Florida, on June 1st, almost two weeks before the start of the 2026 World Cup. That was so the players, many of whom were used to training in the mild climate of Britain, could adapt to the blistering heat of the host nations. But as July has brought western Europe’s third heatwave of 2026, even those not competing in elite sports might wonder how they can train appropriately to beat the heat.
paragraphs.zh: 英格兰足球队于6月1日在美国佛罗里达州西棕榈滩驻训，这距2026年世界杯开幕还有近两个星期。这样做是为了让许多习惯在英国温和气候下训练的球员，提前适应东道国炙热的天气。但随着7月来临，西欧在2026年迎来了第三次热浪，即使是不参加顶级体育赛事的人，也可能会想：自己该如何在训练中合适地“抗热”呢？

paragraphs.en: Preparing for heat requires exposure to heat. That increases levels of blood plasma—the watery stuff which carries blood cells around the body—meaning the heart does not have to work as hard to pump blood, and can beat in a more leisurely manner for longer.
paragraphs.zh: 要做好防暑训练，关键是要让身体接触高温。这样会提高血浆水平——也就是体内携带血细胞的水状成分——使心脏不必如此辛苦地泵血，并且可以更长时间地以更轻松的节奏跳动。

paragraphs.en: More plasma also improves blood flow to the skin. There, tiny sweat glands release water and electrolytes onto the skin’s surface, whence the water evaporates, cooling the body. As the body adapts to heat it lowers the temperature at which perspiration begins, as well as the amount of electrolytes lost.
paragraphs.zh: 更多的血浆也会改善血液流向皮肤。皮肤上的汗腺会把水分和电解质排到皮肤表面，再由水分蒸发带走热量，从而给身体降温。随着身体对高温的适应，出汗开始的体温阈值会降低，同时流失的电解质也会减少。

paragraphs.en: The best way to bring about such changes is “controlled hyperthermia”. Unfortunately, that involves being locked in a heat chamber for 90 minutes and monitored with a rectal thermometer. In the sweltering heat, participants spend 30 minutes exercising to raise their core body temperatures to a target value—usually 38.5°C. The next hour is then spent alternating between exercise and rest to keep their temperature fixed at the target. And you have to repeat this daily for five to seven days.
paragraphs.zh: 促成这些变化的最佳方式是“受控高温负荷训练”。遗憾的是，这通常需要被锁在一个高温舱里90分钟，并由医护人员用直肠温度计监测体温。在闷热环境中，参与者先进行30分钟运动，将核心体温提高到目标值——通常为38.5°C。接下来的一个小时则在运动与休息之间交替进行，以将体温稳定在目标值。然后这种训练要每天重复进行五到七天。

paragraphs.en: Few people, however, have a heat chamber—or the necessary monitoring equipment—in their living room. Fortunately, scientists have devised methods more appropriate for everyday life.
paragraphs.zh: 然而，很少有人在客厅里有一个热舱——更别说配套的监测设备了。幸运的是，科学家们已经提出了更适合日常生活的做法。

paragraphs.en: The simplest is to exercise outside in the heat, says Neil Maxwell, an environmental physiologist at the University of Brighton, in Britain. “That will naturally acclimatise you.”
paragraphs.zh: 正如英国布莱顿大学的环境生理学家尼尔·麦克斯韦尔（Neil Maxwell）所说，最简单的方法就是在高温环境下在户外运动。“这会自然地帮助你完成热适应。”

paragraphs.en: Even better is to add a hot bath. A study published in 2016, in the Scandinavian Journal of Medicine & Science in Sports, found that 40 minutes on a treadmill in 18°C heat followed by 40 minutes in a hot bath, daily for six days, improved several measures of acclimatisation.
paragraphs.zh: 更好的方法是再加上热水澡。一项于2016年发表在《Scandinavian Journal of Medicine & Science in Sports》（《斯堪的纳维亚医学与运动科学杂志》）的研究发现，每天在18°C的热环境中跑步机运动40分钟，随后再在热水中浸泡40分钟，连续六天，可以改善多项热适应指标。

paragraphs.en: In fact, as work published in April in Healthcare found, hot baths alone can do the trick. This research, which looked at healthy adults aged over 65, showed that an hour a day in a 40°C bath produced signs of acclimatisation after just four days. So there is, as it were, no need to sweat it. Simply immersing yourself in hot water brings about the necessary increase in core temperature, says Laura Wilson of Middlesex University, also in Britain, who led the study.
paragraphs.zh: 事实上，正如4月发表在《Healthcare》上的一项研究所显示，仅靠热水澡也能达到同样效果。这项研究调查了65岁以上的健康成年人，发现每天在40°C的热水中浸泡1小时，仅四天后就出现了热适应迹象。因此，换句话说，你没必要大费周章。英国米德尔塞克斯大学（Middlesex University）的劳拉·威尔逊（Laura Wilson）——该研究的负责人——表示，仅仅让身体浸入热水中，就足以带来核心体温的必要上升。

paragraphs.en: Acclimatisation is not permanent. “If you don’t keep exposing yourself to heat, then you’re going to start losing the adaptive benefits,” says Dr Maxwell. Still, only a few days of training are needed in the lead-up to a heatwave. The evidence suggests 75-80% of adaptations build up in the first four to seven days.
paragraphs.zh: 热环境适应不是永久性的。“如果你不持续让自己暴露在高温下，那么你会开始失去这些适应带来的益处，”麦克斯韦尔医生说。不过，在热浪来临前只需要训练几天。证据表明，75%至80%的适应变化会在前四到七天内建立。

paragraphs.en: Heat can be dangerous. And acclimatisation is not immunity. The usual risks from heat still apply. “Try and replace 150% of the fluid you lose during any kind of session to acclimatise,” says Dr Wilson. “If you’re starting to feel faint or dizzy or lightheaded, take yourself out of the environment.”
paragraphs.zh: 高温很危险，而且热适应并不等于免疫。平时高温带来的风险仍然适用。“在任何形式的训练中，尽量补回你流失体液量的150%，以帮助身体适应，”威尔逊医生说。“如果你开始出现头晕、发软或眼前发黑，请立刻离开高温环境。”

paragraphs.en: When done safely, however, some simple tactics could help take the edge off the weather. Jumping in a hot bath may not be appealing as temperatures begin to rise. But your future self will thank you for it. ■
paragraphs.zh: 不过，只要方法得当，一些简单策略也能帮助减轻天气带来的压力。随着气温上升，跳进热水澡可能并不吸引人，但你的未来自己会为此感激。■

paragraphs.en: After a free, evidence-based guide to health and wellness? Sign up to our weekly Well Informed newsletter.
paragraphs.zh: 想获取一份免费的循证健康与养生指南？订阅我们的每周 Well Informed 时事通讯。

articles.title_en: A very silly adaptation of “The Odyssey”
articles.title_zh: 《奥德赛》一部颇为荒诞的改编
articles.rubric_en: Sir Christopher Nolan’s film is emblematic of its time
articles.rubric_zh: 克里斯托弗·诺兰的这部电影代表了它那个时代

paragraphs.en: The squabbles have been epic. Sir Christopher Nolan’s adaptation of “The Odyssey” was causing conniptions long before anyone had even seen the thing. Ahead of its release on July 17th, there was harrumphing over everything from the actress playing Helen (too black); the colour of the plume on Odysseus’s helmet (too red); the soldiers’ armour (also too black, and too Batman-like) and the vocabulary of Odysseus’s son (too American: at one point he says “Dad”). On YouTube the film’s trailer was met with criticism. “If I saw this on a plane, I’d still walk out,” reads one disgruntled comment.
paragraphs.zh: 争议大得惊人。克里斯托弗·诺兰改编的《奥德赛》在正式上映之前就已经引发了轰动。影片定于7月17日上映前，争议便从女主海伦的选角（太黑了）、奥德修斯头盔上的羽饰颜色（太红了）、士兵的铠甲（也太黑、太像蝙蝠侠）到奥德修斯儿子的用词（太美国化：有一处他说“Dad”）无所不包。影片预告片在YouTube上也遭到批评。一条不满评论写道：“如果我在飞机上看这部片，我仍然会下飞机。”

paragraphs.en: The film itself is unlikely to allay any anxieties about anachronisms. In everything from its scenery to its psychology it says far more about the modern West than about ancient Greece. Startling liberties are taken with the plot to turn Odysseus, the archetypally flawed ancient hero, into a simple modern goody by flattening his flaws. Any bad behaviour is explained away either by drug use or hinted to be due to proto-PTSD (the overdiagnosis epidemic having apparently reached the ancient shores of Ithaca). The ending, which has him pierced by arrows and turned into a St Sebastian-style pincushion, is sillier still.
paragraphs.zh: 影片本身也不太可能平息人们对时代错置的担忧。它从布景到人物心理几乎都更像在诉说当代西方，而非古希腊。为了把奥德修斯这个典型的“有缺陷”古典英雄改造成一个单纯的现代正面形象，影片在情节上做出了令人震惊的取舍，压平了他的缺点。影片把任何不当行为都归咎于吸毒，或暗示源于一种“早期PTSD”（似乎“过度诊断”已一并漂到了伊萨卡的古老海岸）。结局里他被箭射中后化作“圣塞巴斯蒂安式”穿针刺绣的靶盘般的样子，更是荒诞离谱。

paragraphs.en: The scenery is similarly unsuitable, and often far too pretty. Soldiers in elegant gunmetal grey look less like ancient warriors than Warhammer toys. The ochre, candlelit palaces do not resemble warlords’ lairs but boutique hotels. During the beach scenes with the nymph Calypso (Charlize Theron), Odysseus (Matt Damon) seems less to be in agonising exile than on a Caribbean mini-break (they are wearing lots of linen). And the less said about the Cyclops, the better.
paragraphs.zh: 布景同样不合适，而且常常太过好看。身披雅致枪灰色铠甲的士兵，看上去不像古代勇士，更像是战锤（Warhammer）模型玩具。黄褐色、烛光照亮的宫殿，也不像霸主的隐居营寨，更像精品酒店。奥德修斯和海神女（卡吕普索）在海滩上的片段（女主由查莉泽·塞隆饰演，奥德修斯由马特·达蒙饰演）更像是去加勒比海度了个短途度假（两人都穿着大量亚麻布），而不是在承受痛苦的放逐。对独眼巨人的描写越少提及越好。

paragraphs.en: This is irksome but typical. Every adaptation of an ancient text is as much about its own era as the original work; less a lens than a mirror. The ancient Athenians transformed Homeric epic into psychologically acute tragedy. In the 18th century Alexander Pope’s translation managed to make Odysseus sound like an effete Enlightenment poet rather than an ancient warrior-king. In 1922 James Joyce’s version offered sex, stream of consciousness and that Modernist literary staple: boredom.
paragraphs.zh: 这种情况令人恼火，却并不罕见。每一次古典文本的改编，本质上都和原作一样，反映的是自身时代；它更像一面镜子，而非一只镜片。古代雅典人把荷马史诗改写成了心理深刻的悲剧。18世纪，亚历山大·蒲柏的译本让奥德修斯听起来像一位文雅的启蒙时代诗人，而不是一位古代的武士国王。1922年，詹姆斯·乔伊斯的版本则加入了性、意识流，以及现代主义文学的经典元素：无聊。

paragraphs.en: In this way, Sir Christopher’s retelling is part of a time-honoured tradition. It is manifestly a product of the present day. Female characters offer frequent apologias for feminism (not a noted strong suit of the ancients). The casus belli of the Trojan war is given as a desire to improve trade routes, as if Agamemnon were merely a blameless advocate for free trade rather than one of antiquity’s greatest thugs.
paragraphs.zh: 在这个意义上，克里斯托弗·诺兰的重述属于一项历史悠久的传统。它显然是当下时代的产物。女角色频繁为女权主义发声（这并非古人所擅长的强项）。特洛伊战争的开战理由被说成是为了改善贸易路线，仿佛阿伽门农只是一个无可指摘的自由贸易倡导者，而不是古代最凶狠的恶霸之一。

paragraphs.en: Adaptations have some latitude, for “The Odyssey” contains multitudes. In one of the most famous scenes, the god Proteus transforms into a lion, then a snake, then rushing water. “The Odyssey” is more protean still. In the three millennia since it was composed, it has been on an odyssey all its own.
paragraphs.zh: 改编自《奥德赛》有一定的解释空间，因为《奥德赛》本身内涵丰富。 在最著名的一个场景中，海神波塞冬化作一头狮子，又化作一条蛇，接着变成奔腾的水流。《奥德赛》本身更具多变性。在它成书后的三千年里，它一直经历着属于自己的一次“奥德赛式”漂流与变形。

paragraphs.en: The poem has become a noun (an odyssey) and an adjective (Odyssean). It has become a play, a TV series, a novel (“Ulysses”) and a porn film (“Odyssey: The Ultimate Trip”). It has become a lunar lander (IM-1 Odysseus), a large asteroid (1143 Odysseus) and a body lotion (which, with notes of black pepper and sandalwood, no doubt smells better than its namesake would have).
paragraphs.zh: 这部史诗已经成为一个名词（odyssey），也成为一个形容词（Odyssean）。它又变成一部戏剧、一部电视剧、一部小说（《尤利西斯》）和一部色情电影（《Odyssey: The Ultimate Trip》）。它还成为一艘登月器（IM-1 Odysseus）、一颗大行星（1143 Odysseus）以及一款润肤乳（带有黑胡椒和檀香气味，毫无疑问闻起来会比它的名字来源更好闻）。

paragraphs.en: It is therefore not surprising that Odysseus, the sacker of cities, has been transformed once again by Sir Christopher. In other ways it is surprising, as “The Odyssey” has been a wrecker of reputations. In 2024 a film starring Ralph Fiennes was dismissed as “dull” and a “slog”. A movie of 1954, starring Kirk Douglas, was described as “weird” and “vapid”.
paragraphs.zh: 所以，战神奥德修斯（Odysseus）再次被克里斯托弗改造成别样形态并不令人意外。另一些方面则更令人意外，因为《奥德赛》历来是“毁名作”——它毁掉过不少作品的评价。在2024年，一部由拉尔夫·费因斯主演的电影被批评为“枯燥”与“漫长乏味”。一部1954年的电影，主角是柯克·道格拉斯，也被描述为“怪异”和“空洞”。

paragraphs.en: Sir Christopher has form on tricky topics: his previous film, “Oppenheimer”, about particle physics and nuclear weapons, grossed almost $1bn at the box office. Still, he has learned that “The Odyssey” is not an easy book to film.
paragraphs.zh: 克里斯托弗·诺兰在处理棘手题材方面一向是得心应手：他上一部关于粒子物理和核武器的电影《奥本海默》在票房上几乎赚到10亿美元。不过，他也已经明白《奥德赛》并不是一部容易拍成电影的书。

paragraphs.en: That porn flick hints at why: it describes itself, with admirable artistic honesty, as “Three unrelated stories”. The original “Odyssey” is not much better. It tells the tale of Odysseus’s ten-year journey home from the Trojan war and thus is commonly thought of as a kind of watery Greek road trip. But it is also a sex-and-sea-monsters film, a father-and-son film and a husband-and-wife film.
paragraphs.zh: 那部电影也从侧面提示了原因：它用可敬的艺术诚实自称是“三个不相关的故事”。原著《奥德赛》也不算容易处理。它讲述了奥德修斯从特洛伊战争归乡、历时十年的旅程，因此常被当作一种“泼天”希腊公路片来看待；但它同时也是一部性与海怪题材的片子，一部父子关系电影，也是一部夫妻关系电影。

paragraphs.en: Its structure is fiendishly twisty. It is about Odysseus—but readers do not meet him for four books. Moreover, many of the stories that you think of as archetypally Odyssean are either not told at all or told in brisk narrative flashback: the Sirens slip by in some 60 lines and the Lotus-Eaters in about 20. It is, as Sir Christopher said, “the original non-linear narrative”. It is, says Emily Wilson, a classicist who published a dazzling translation in 2017, “complicated”.
paragraphs.zh: 它的结构狡猾得令人头疼。它写的是奥德修斯，但读者前四卷都见不到他。另外，许多我们认为是典型“奥德赛式”的故事，要么根本没被讲述，要么只在叙事回闪中匆匆一带而过：海妖情节大约只用60行，罗托斯食人花（神话中的“食莲花者”）也只占约20行。诺兰本人曾说，这是一种“最早的非线性叙事”；而2017年出版过一部极具亮点译本的古典文学学者艾米莉·威尔逊（Emily Wilson）则称它“复杂”。

paragraphs.en: It is also very famous. The second work of Western literature, it was once assumed to be secondary in seriousness to its more manly prequel, “The Iliad”. Yet in recent years its fame has far eclipsed it. The first Penguin Classic ever printed was “The Odyssey”. The pyramid of intellectual biomass resting upon it is vast. It is only 12,000 lines long, but look up “Odyssey” in the British Library and you are offered 34,000 titles: almost three for every line. “Iliad” returns a mere 9,000.
paragraphs.zh: 它也非常出名。作为西方文学中的第二部作品，它曾被认为严肃性上不及更“阳刚”的前作《伊利亚特》。但近几年，它的名声已经远远盖过了后者。企鹅经典（Penguin Classic）第一本付印的书就是《奥德赛》。围绕它建立起来的思想金字塔非常庞大。它只有12,000行，但在英国图书馆里检索“Odyssey”，会出现34,000个书目：几乎每一行都对应三条记录；而“Iliad”只有9,000条。

paragraphs.en: That it has become yet another film—and created yet more debates—is further proof of its permanence. There are two ways to see such squabbles. One is to engage with them on their own terms. These gripes have some validity: in Homer, Helen is clearly described as “white-armed”; Odysseus probably didn’t wear a red-plumed helmet (red was a Spartan habit); ancient Greek armour was bronze, not Batman-ish; and Odysseus’s son definitely didn’t say “Dad”. As Tim Whitmarsh, Regius professor of Greek at Cambridge University, points out: “The ancient Greeks spoke Greek.”
paragraphs.zh: 它又成为另一部电影，并引发了更多争论，这反而进一步证明了它的持久性。对这些争执可以有两种解读。第一种是按争执本身来回应：这些抱怨确有一定道理。荷马的文本中，海伦确实被明确写作“白臂（白纤手）”；奥德修斯大概没有戴着红羽毛头盔（红色是斯巴达人的习俗）；古希腊的盔甲是青铜的，而不是“蝙蝠侠式”的；而且奥德修斯的儿子绝对没有说“Dad”。正如剑桥大学拉吉厄斯希腊语教授蒂姆·惠特马什（Tim Whitmarsh）指出的：“古希腊人说的是希腊语。”

paragraphs.en: The other way to see these arguments is as proof of the malleability of “The Odyssey”. In an era in which people bristle at American influence in Europe, it lets people bristle at Americanisms (“Dad!”) in ancient Greece. In an era anxious about the excessively manly manosphere, people can fret over excessively manly armour. In an era riven by debates about race, people have engaged in bad-tempered rows over casting. We are not arguing about “The Odyssey” when we argue about “The Odyssey”. We are arguing about ourselves.
paragraphs.zh: 另一种看法是，把这些争论视作《奥德赛》可塑性的证明。在一个对欧洲受美国影响神经紧绷的时代，它允许人们对古希腊中的“美国式”说法（“Dad!”）生气；在一个对“男子气概”过盛的男性话语圈（manosphere）焦虑的时代，人们会对过于“男性化”的盔甲斤斤计较；在一个被种族争论撕扯的时代，人们则围绕选角爆发激烈争吵。我们在讨论《奥德赛》时并不是在辩论《奥德赛》本身。我们其实在辩论的是我们自己。

paragraphs.en: Each generation remakes “The Odyssey” in its own image: you get the version you deserve. The clever, quarrelsome ancient Athenians took Homer and transformed him into clever, quarrelsome tragedy. The Modernists turned him into Modernist prose and poetry. The simplistic, visual modern world has taken Homer and turned him into social-media spats and an absurd Cyclops—and thus into a tragedy that is all its own. ■
paragraphs.zh: 每一代人都在按自己的样子重塑《奥德赛》：你看到的是你所应得的版本。聪明而爱争辩的古雅典人把荷马改造成了聪明而爱争辩的悲剧。现代主义者把他改写成了现代主义散文和诗歌。而这个简化、视觉化的现代世界，将荷马变成了社交媒体上的口角和一场荒诞的独眼巨人故事——于是《奥德赛》也就变成了一部属于这个时代自己的悲剧。■

paragraphs.en: For more on the latest books, films, TV shows, albums and controversies, sign up to Plot Twist, our weekly subscriber-only newsletter
paragraphs.zh: 如需了解更多最新图书、电影、电视剧、专辑和争议，欢迎订阅 Plot Twist，每周一期、仅向订阅者开放。

articles.title_en: Why Sir Christopher Nolan inspires such devotion—and contempt
articles.title_zh: 为何克里斯托弗·诺兰会赢得如此狂热的追捧与蔑视
articles.rubric_en: His films are ambitious and technically brilliant, but often emotionally detached
articles.rubric_zh: 他的电影雄心勃勃、技术上出色，却常常情感上显得疏离

paragraphs.en: THE SEVEN most dangerous words anyone can say to a film aficionado are: “What do you think of Christopher Nolan?” The question will almost certainly elicit one of two reactions: a long, fevered disquisition on the masterful craftsmanship of his 12 feature films (now 13, with the release of “The Odyssey”)—or eye-rolling contempt. Almost nobody will shrug and say, “Eh, he’s fine.”
paragraphs.zh: 对电影发烧友来说，最危险的七个词之一就是：“你怎么看克里斯托弗·诺兰？”这个问题几乎必然引发两种反应之一：要么是对他这位导演12部长片（现在有了《奥德赛》后是13部）炉火纯青工艺的漫长、热烈论辩，要么就是翻个白眼的轻蔑。几乎没人会不经思索地耸肩说一句：“嗯，还行。”

paragraphs.en: Perhaps that is unsurprising: ambitious artists tend to provoke strong reactions, and Sir Christopher Nolan is nothing if not ambitious. He is the seventh-highest-grossing film director ever, and the most important British film-maker since Alfred Hitchcock. Like Hitchcock, he is devoted to the technical work of film-making: “The Odyssey” is the first blockbuster to be shot entirely on IMAX film, a format that produces sumptuous images but is harder to work with than digital cinematography.
paragraphs.zh: 这也许并不令人惊讶：有抱负的艺术家本就容易激起强烈反应，而克里斯托弗·诺兰绝对不是没有抱负的。按票房总额计算，他是有史以来第七位最高票房导演，也是阿尔弗雷德·希区柯克之后最重要的英国电影人。和希区柯克一样，他痴迷于电影制作的技术层面： 《奥德赛》是第一部全片都用 IMAX 胶片拍摄的商业大片，这种格式能带来华丽的画面，但比数字电影摄影更难驾驭。

paragraphs.en: Sir Christopher stands out from his peers for having the widest-ranging, most original and brainiest oeuvre. Like many directors working today, he has done franchise flicks—he made three Batman films between 2005 and 2012—but they were an interlude rather than the capstone of his career. So what is it about Sir Christopher that makes him such a divisive film-maker?
paragraphs.zh: 诺兰在同行中之所以格外突出，是因为他的作品覆盖面最广、最有原创性、也最“有脑”。和许多当代导演一样，他也拍过系列电影——2005年至2012年间他拍了三部《蝙蝠侠》——但那只是职业生涯中的一次插曲，而不是压轴之作。那究竟是什么，让诺兰成为一位如此两极分化的电影作者？

paragraphs.en: Start with the man himself. He was born in 1970 to a British father and an American mother. He works with family: his wife, Emma Thomas, produces his films; his uncle, John Nolan, acted in some of them; he writes with his brother Jonathan; and his four children worked on “The Odyssey”. He is efficient, known for shooting films quickly and often to budget.
paragraphs.zh: 先从他本人说起。他于1970年出生，父亲是英国人，母亲是美国人。他的创作离不开家庭：妻子艾玛·托马斯负责制作他的电影；叔叔约翰·诺兰参演了其中几部；他与哥哥乔纳森共同执笔；他的四个孩子也参与了《奥德赛》的制作。他工作高效，以拍片节奏快且常常控制住预算而闻名。

paragraphs.en: Tom Shone, a film critic who wrote a book about Sir Christopher, has described him as “a very familiar type of Englishman…the kind of upper-middle-class son of the home counties one could imagine with a career in the City who plays rugby with his fellow brokers on the weekend”. That implies a streak of conservatism, which emerges in his work. His final Batman film, “The Dark Knight Rises” (2012), warns against the tempting, corrosive zeal of revolutionary violence. Paternal duty powers “Interstellar” (2014). “Dunkirk” (2017) celebrates British doughtiness.
paragraphs.zh: 电影评论家汤姆·肖恩在一本关于克里斯托弗·诺兰的著作中把他描述为“一个非常熟悉的英格兰人类型……那种你可以想象得到的英格兰中上层家庭出身的‘本都县’子弟，在城市里有一份职业，周末与同事经纪人一起打橄榄球的人”。这暗示出一种保守主义倾向，而这种倾向在他的作品中也有所体现。他的最终一部《蝙蝠侠》电影《黑暗骑士崛起》（2012）警示人们革命性暴力所带来的诱惑与侵蚀性的狂热。《星际穿越》（2014）则以“父职责任”作为动力源。《敦刻尔克》（2017）歌颂了英国人的坚韧不拔。

paragraphs.en: However, his films are defined less by conservatism than by their slipperiness. His breakout film, “Memento” (2000), about an amnesiac trying to solve his wife’s murder, would be chewed over by fans and detractors for years afterwards. Many viewers praised its structural inventiveness: black-and-white scenes tell a story chronologically and colour ones tell one in reverse. They meet at the end.
paragraphs.zh: 然而，与其说他的电影由保守主义定义，不如说更容易让人觉得它们滑溜难以把握。他的突破之作《记忆碎片》（2000）讲述一位失忆男子试图侦破妻子谋杀案，这部片子多年后仍被影迷与反对者反复讨论。许多观众称赞其结构上的巧思：黑白场景按时间顺序推进，而彩色场景则倒着讲述；两者在结尾处交会。

paragraphs.en: More tricksiness would follow. “Inception” (2010) imagined the manipulation of dreams for corporate espionage. “Interstellar” takes place on multiple planets and features a wormhole and a black hole. Three narratives come together in “Dunkirk”. In “Tenet” (2020) people and objects move forwards and backwards through time. Even “Oppenheimer” (2023), a biopic of an American theoretical physicist, jumps between the 1930s, 1940s and 1950s.
paragraphs.zh: 更多更诡谲的手法接踵而至。《盗梦空间》（2010）构想了通过梦境操控来实施企业间间谍活动。《星际穿越》发生在多个行星之间，并出现了虫洞与黑洞。《敦刻尔克》里有三条叙事线交汇。《信条》（2020）中，人和物体都会在时间中前行和后退。即便是《奥本海默》（2023）这样一部关于美国理论物理学家的传记片，也在20世纪30年代、40年代和50年代之间跳转。

paragraphs.en: Sir Christopher’s films often provide a satisfying moment of realisation. But they rarely reward viewers who ruminate on the plot after the credits roll. In the case of “Memento”, for instance, you might wonder how a character with amnesia remembers his amnesia. Roger Ebert, a late American film critic, joked that the protagonist “suffers from a condition brought on by a screenplay that finds it necessary, and it’s unkind of us to inquire too deeply”.
paragraphs.zh: 诺兰的电影常常能带来一个令人满足的“恍然大悟”时刻。但它们很少会奖励那些在片尾字幕后仍反复思索情节的观众。以《记忆碎片》为例，你可能会想：一个失忆者究竟如何记得自己患有失忆症？已故美国影评人罗杰·艾伯特开玩笑说，男主角“遭受了一种由电影剧本引发的状态，而这种状态本身就有其合理性；我们若深追其因，未免有失礼貌。”

paragraphs.en: Similar questions could be asked of dreams, wormholes or, in “The Prestige” (2006), his film about magicians, cloning and teleportation. All of it makes for entertaining cinema, but it does not make much sense. Viewers’ enjoyment of these films hinges on their willingness to suspend scepticism and tune into the vibe.
paragraphs.zh: 同样的问题也可以拿来问他的梦境、虫洞，或《致命魔术》（2006）——这部关于魔术师、克隆与传送的电影。所有这些素材都能拍出有趣的电影，但并不十分讲得通。观众对这些影片的欣赏，取决于他们是否愿意暂时搁置怀疑，转而投入它的氛围。

paragraphs.en: A more serious charge concerns Sir Christopher’s treatment of female characters. The most important woman in “Memento” is the protagonist’s dead wife. Dead wives or girlfriends also further the plots of “The Prestige”, “Inception”, “The Dark Knight” and “Interstellar”. “Dunkirk” features just two minor female characters.
paragraphs.zh: 一个更严肃的指控涉及诺兰对女性角色的处理。《记忆碎片》里最重要的女性角色是主人公的已故妻子。《致命魔术》《盗梦空间》《黑暗骑士》和《星际穿越》中，已故的妻子或女友也都推动着情节发展。《敦刻尔克》里只出现了两个次要女性角色。

paragraphs.en: This charge can be overblown, though. “Interstellar” features two strong female figures. Anne Hathaway, Katie Holmes and Maggie Gyllenhaal play integral roles in the Batman films. And Emily Blunt got an Oscar nod for her stellar performance as J. Robert Oppenheimer’s (admittedly stoic and long-suffering) wife. Sir Christopher has not written a female protagonist just as Greta Gerwig, a star female director, has not written a male one in her solo projects.
paragraphs.zh: 不过，这一指控可能有些夸大。《星际穿越》中有两个性格鲜明的女性角色。安妮·海瑟薇、凯蒂·霍尔姆斯和玛吉·吉伦哈尔在《蝙蝠侠》系列电影中都扮演了重要角色。艾米莉·布朗特因其出色演绎J·罗伯特·奥本海默的妻子而获奥斯卡提名，这位妻子虽确实坚忍且长期承受痛苦。诺兰并没有写过女性主角，正如明星女性导演格蕾塔·格威格在她的个人作品中也没有写过男性主角。

paragraphs.en: For it is not women, but people, in whom Sir Christopher has only recently begun to show interest. The protagonist in “Tenet”, as well as a pivotal character in “Dunkirk”, has no name. Many film-makers progress from small, intimate films to bigger-budget, higher-concept ones; in some ways, Sir Christopher has taken the opposite path, going from films that unfold like puzzles to something more human.
paragraphs.zh: 因为真正的问题并非在于女性，而是人物；诺兰直到最近才开始真正关注“人”。《信条》里的主角，以及《敦刻尔克》里一个关键人物，都是没有名字的。许多电影人是从小制作、私密题材的电影走向预算更高、理念更宏大的作品；在某种程度上，诺兰走的是相反路线，从像谜题一样展开的电影走向更偏向人性的一面。

paragraphs.en: “Oppenheimer” depicted the enmity between the titular character and Lewis Strauss, his bureaucratic nemesis.
